name: Bill Hagerty
subject: now more than ever before
body:
As America fights the coronavirus, our campaign has had to adapt.
Peter,As America fights the coronavirus, our campaign has had to adapt. We've launched #CheckInTN, a social media campaign aimed at connecting Tennesseans with loved ones who are separated by social distancing practices. We've also mobilized our staff to help support local businesses across the state.But this crisis has also limited our ability to meet with voters and raise the grassroots funds necessary to win.That's why we're relying on emails like this--now more than ever before--to help us build our campaign.If you can, [**please consider making a contribution to our campaign.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuyddhd-fuutjhhtj-r/) Thank you.Bill HagertyCandidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN) [MAKE A CONTRIBUTION](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuyddhd-fuutjhhtj-y/) | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuyddhd-fuutjhhtj-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuyddhd-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuyddhd-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nuyddhd-fuutjhhtj-d/)

name: Team Tom
subject: What we’re reading:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Hi there,

While we’re practicing social distancing, we’re also working on a strategy to take back our democracy — because there’s a lot we can still do while working to flatten the curve. Last week, we shared resources for giving and receiving support during this pandemic. Thank you to everyone who continues to help their communities in this crisis.
This week, we’re sharing some reading recommendations. Staying informed on the critical challenges facing our country is the first step to addressing them.

We hope you enjoy, and thank you for being in this fight with us.

Team Tom
---
|
---
**What I Learned While Running for President
**In case you missed it, Tom shared some of his learnings, disappointments, and favorite parts of running for president. He discussed some of the significant issues facing Americans today as well as his continued commitment to realizing meaningful change. **A Crisis In Education: Schools Can’t Reach Thousands Of Children
**While schools are struggling to continue education in spite of shelter-in-place orders, some educators aren’t able to contact their students at all. Beyond a lapse in studies, teachers are worried some kids may not have access to food or safe shelter. And for students who already work long hours outside school, there’s concern they won’t ever return to class. [_**Read more from HuffPost here.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=2PbTaIH-2Bu1BICxGw6BOoZp6dahmz7Li66yx0-2BN0cBkq9Oui1bdkdY4TZg7v9T3YwgYgj-2BPES6Ov-2F2YfNUhrQxekaYs8mPS3qT3vaPFAozsnR2uN4TOwEWx93MHc1JwgemHd-2F6GLP30ag-2B76zXbJAMQ-3D-3DxDd1_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymj-2F7ZKPx3NVKw8kjoD6Gq3c-2BrItP5taLUBrsAr-2FjZetFIJTu2XOSYWw-2BRTsCZVEZUmXdgh-2BenInj6gTOMryUZZwrlIkQBJ5XRORo7Ik6uHSiRVxU7K9eso5BonxRChHafUSNSA2XTEoctC3XZtDAXUHQdVaeA0XXRebZ-2F-2BPuKqKzAMZIqtSkLTDmcuDKTd7-2BtZm9C-2FGg1Wjm9XXkKCtMY7Mz7IHs0PhmXBaGxwj7VFi4ZtCJ65CtWMXBNvLEtsF3VJd1YHpMzmRjg8qA4MzLMyNXg3kQgj0pawPgzK4ukm4njq4nPLwIjrAV-2BhommigP68IWv-2FCynPIVKwwGMnCMhMDBrAc8ZmekVC-2Bfi98kX3wKIAfzDPKrt60RVPL9rtZYgRcQuzvGyymuOyfKRn3avC-2Ba7PfKZHmJ8AqMzwBnvCZQVcBabjIzhdGrQ43K-2BVuO2HIjgINjJA7sYWgWSKhXbaOIXTXaYWIC-2FTOXf4v2NtZiD2C22HK2ptJaoMJ3c-2BRBVcC-2BCy6PSkNezFMqg0TsLyW2clKdI9kHMGYK9xoRpGMT3AnkGzXUngLWIJmwqlNsjnYrSZKISFhbef7w9vZpcoiXVD-2BOn9plRU0nPkhAUgpjik-2Bz3PBsVOFnTF-2F0bVtF8WxjKK-2BFz-2BoL4sWcOCk7uMwqX-2FoCXMMXlaIkNIM5w3zvHwUEpLLkPKkP7AeOPtXow-2B4xboHlZhZ5slSYFc5cvtYVkI2EWSFnCd-2BTp34WDZ-2FG0LitwWmkOkWRXe2wdPpcWKZtbT75T8-2F21w5Qzp-2BMZ1p)

**Coronavirus hits poor, minority communities harder
**Preliminary data show that communities of color and low-income communities are especially vulnerable to COVID-19. African Americans make up a significant portion of the coronavirus cases and deaths. Pre-existing disparities — substandard housing, underlying health conditions, lack of health insurance and access to care — contribute to the virus’s unequal toll. [_**Read more from Axios here.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=2PbTaIH-2Bu1BICxGw6BOoZtd7QHdUrVgHWVH0UGDJAd0-2Bg2fTeDXSp1DL8kmtx5IaNE10qaC8LRlofXYmj6WrJB3lpx66VZfjlZvgETljegYNhwHegdQqmgw5Ck3MnR-2BF4-2Fm0x1luNWWiSMTZX5puq1SMT9tVJqUWLEcFzdZ5O4w-3DphOk_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymj-2F7ZKPx3NVKw8kjoD6Gq3c-2BrItP5taLUBrsAr-2FjZetFIJTu2XOSYWw-2BRTsCZVEZUmXdgh-2BenInj6gTOMryUZZwrlIkQBJ5XRORo7Ik6uHSiRVxU7K9eso5BonxRChHafUSNSA2XTEoctC3XZtDAXUHQdVaeA0XXRebZ-2F-2BPuKqKzAMZIqtSkLTDmcuDKTd7-2BtZm9C-2FGg1Wjm9XXkKCtMY7Mz7IHs0PhmXBaGxwj7VFi4ZtCJ65CtWMXBNvLEtsF3VJd1YHpMzmRjg8qA4MzLMyNXg3kQgj0pawPgzK4ukm4njq4nPLwIjrAV-2BhommigP68IWv-2FCynPIVKwwGMnCMhMDBrAc8ZmekVC-2Bfi98kX3wKIAfzDPKrt60RVPL9rtZYgRcQuzvGyymuOyfKRn3avC-2Ba7PfKZHmJ8AqMzwBnvCZQVcBabjIzhdGrQ43K-2BVuO2HIjgINjJA7sYWgWSKhXbaOIXTXaYWIC-2FTOXf4v2NtZiD2C22HK2ptJaoMJ3c-2BRBVcC-2BCy6PSkNezFMqg0TsLyW2clKdI9kHMGYK9xoRpGMT3AnkGzXUngLWIJmwqlNsjl8Xnuh9ZUo9lzBuXvec4Tn0-2B8zCOpIL2uufn-2BH5a94tOK4llXwzm06eaaM-2BbaTkgv96axYJvS-2BC1w5AdR77B4YwzQT-2BasRe8NETYo-2FLIQq4Izvi8voZia9YoS3eo2gVBDLN27l3ezUMa7DL5b3IwJzrhGxkqslioC6xHk7tAX272Zbkcx6uIb01CW2UQVw0m7z2wXt6LIrRQZ0BW4jFSRq)

**Coronavirus Doesn’t Slow Trump’s Regulatory Rollbacks****
** While legislators, scientists, and health professionals are hard at work providing relief for COVID-19, the Trump administration continues its environmental deregulatory agenda — denying requests to extend the public comment periods. The rollbacks include: weakening Obama-era fuel efficiency standards; relaxing restrictions on toxic ash from coal plants and mercury emissions; and negating climate change considerations on environmental reviews. [_**Read more from the New York Times here.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=2PbTaIH-2Bu1BICxGw6BOoZjxg2l42iMIJBZZBWIufk814n9P-2Feu8GCZLC9lpZ4Z-2BDSmgcdNYT6G4MAqdhGDDvV7oaOuQi1dZgAJ2MhFnSQG3Z7HdaV0LPN55WqkX0IdlYXjL4ldSwxi0WrvYRycN6HA-3D-3D6SCU_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymj-2F7ZKPx3NVKw8kjoD6Gq3c-2BrItP5taLUBrsAr-2FjZetFIJTu2XOSYWw-2BRTsCZVEZUmXdgh-2BenInj6gTOMryUZZwrlIkQBJ5XRORo7Ik6uHSiRVxU7K9eso5BonxRChHafUSNSA2XTEoctC3XZtDAXUHQdVaeA0XXRebZ-2F-2BPuKqKzAMZIqtSkLTDmcuDKTd7-2BtZm9C-2FGg1Wjm9XXkKCtMY7Mz7IHs0PhmXBaGxwj7VFi4ZtCJ65CtWMXBNvLEtsF3VJd1YHpMzmRjg8qA4MzLMyNXg3kQgj0pawPgzK4ukm4njq4nPLwIjrAV-2BhommigP68IWv-2FCynPIVKwwGMnCMhMDBrAc8ZmekVC-2Bfi98kX3wKIAfzDPKrt60RVPL9rtZYgRcQuzvGyymuOyfKRn3avC-2Ba7PfKZHmJ8AqMzwBnvCZQVcBabjIzhdGrQ43K-2BVuO2HIjgINjJA7sYWgWSKhXbaOIXTXaYWIC-2FTOXf4v2NtZiD2C22HK2ptJaoMJ3c-2BRBVcC-2BCy6PSkNezFMqg0TsLyW2clKdI9kHMGYK9xoRpGMT3AnkGzXUngLWIJmwqlNsjk6LP0uE6mtaG-2Blvb3ap7pHOX90UgLvDnpdV-2FXGqne1LtagOU3KAb0aSKTCxMWIo-2F81Dt3-2FM-2BJ9EsKiCZAyiBzv69Ocp5chZ83Z6sYqTyDHq9KY1A3mcfNzvuQibtkNk-2FAoCevxYtXtjwDg1BfZARtB5WBjrGMNi3SGLm2elGQGYTesuYxzuYcSr-2FDxmG-2FdYrX4fHp2xh0AVQ6opui4zwsB)

**Tom’s Top Climate Books
**Tom’s unrelenting passion for climate action has been informed by books that investigate the crisis from various perspectives — ideological entrenchment, corporate malfeasance, scientific consensus, and grassroots uprising. [_**See Tom’s recommendations here.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=2PbTaIH-2Bu1BICxGw6BOoZp9LuUOhA-2BNN6oN-2FmlCkJWspGdfzp7Bf9F6sFSXNqS-2BTq5RNJjKjpVF-2F3qymDQNZTw-3D-3Dx-Lq_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymj-2F7ZKPx3NVKw8kjoD6Gq3c-2BrItP5taLUBrsAr-2FjZetFIJTu2XOSYWw-2BRTsCZVEZUmXdgh-2BenInj6gTOMryUZZwrlIkQBJ5XRORo7Ik6uHSiRVxU7K9eso5BonxRChHafUSNSA2XTEoctC3XZtDAXUHQdVaeA0XXRebZ-2F-2BPuKqKzAMZIqtSkLTDmcuDKTd7-2BtZm9C-2FGg1Wjm9XXkKCtMY7Mz7IHs0PhmXBaGxwj7VFi4ZtCJ65CtWMXBNvLEtsF3VJd1YHpMzmRjg8qA4MzLMyNXg3kQgj0pawPgzK4ukm4njq4nPLwIjrAV-2BhommigP68IWv-2FCynPIVKwwGMnCMhMDBrAc8ZmekVC-2Bfi98kX3wKIAfzDPKrt60RVPL9rtZYgRcQuzvGyymuOyfKRn3avC-2Ba7PfKZHmJ8AqMzwBnvCZQVcBabjIzhdGrQ43K-2BVuO2HIjgINjJA7sYWgWSKhXbaOIXTXaYWIC-2FTOXf4v2NtZiD2C22HK2ptJaoMJ3c-2BRBVcC-2BCy6PSkNezFMqg0TsLyW2clKdI9kHMGYK9xoRpGMT3AnkGzXUngLWIJmwqlNsjkCjNEvMMeaHAnF8Z3Y04yCiYUgRWZzsuHP103bk7T4aMn7CX-2BEzVBdqF-2BiCtT-2Bq0vlX33PzNeuCAKDW9pEJmD8okKzhk6stU4Y8Kz4quBke3MFMpd079JziU-2BkxLFSrU76xE7SApu5bPvQHCl-2FlHaiN9FWvzW7qmnGM20Kk4Pe9ynL8m3H-2Bq5zBl75jtvpFQ8xYDvmZDjaDbcGezjjPG52)

clean_body: | | | | Hi there, While we’re practicing social distancing, we’re also working on a strategy to take back our democracy — because there’s a lot we can still do while working to flatten the curve. Last week, we shared resources for giving and receiving support during this pandemic. Thank you to everyone who continues to help their communities in this crisis. This week, we’re sharing some reading recommendations. Staying informed on the critical challenges facing our country is the first step to addressing them. We hope you enjoy, and thank you for being in this fight with us. Team Tom | What I Learned While Running for President In case you missed it, Tom shared some of his learnings, disappointments, and favorite parts of running for president. He discussed some of the significant issues facing Americans today as well as his continued commitment to realizing meaningful change. A Crisis In Education: Schools Can’t Reach Thousands Of Children While schools are struggling to continue education in spite of shelter-in-place orders, some educators aren’t able to contact their students at all. Beyond a lapse in studies, teachers are worried some kids may not have access to food or safe shelter. And for students who already work long hours outside school, there’s concern they won’t ever return to class. Coronavirus hits poor, minority communities harder Preliminary data show that communities of color and low-income communities are especially vulnerable to COVID-19. African Americans make up a significant portion of the coronavirus cases and deaths. Pre-existing disparities — substandard housing, underlying health conditions, lack of health insurance and access to care — contribute to the virus’s unequal toll. Coronavirus Doesn’t Slow Trump’s Regulatory Rollbacks While legislators, scientists, and health professionals are hard at work providing relief for COVID-19, the Trump administration continues its environmental deregulatory agenda — denying requests to extend the public comment periods. The rollbacks include: weakening Obama-era fuel efficiency standards; relaxing restrictions on toxic ash from coal plants and mercury emissions; and negating climate change considerations on environmental reviews. Tom’s Top Climate Books Tom’s unrelenting passion for climate action has been informed by books that investigate the crisis from various perspectives — ideological entrenchment, corporate malfeasance, scientific consensus, and grassroots uprising. | | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Please visit for information and resources to help slow the spread of COVID-19 and prevent infection. Follow CDC guidelines, including social distancing to avoid large groups and unnecessary contact with others, and adhere to instruction from your local and state elected officials. We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about how you can help us do what's right. If you’d rather not receive any emails from us, you can unsubscribe by clicking — we'll be sad to see you go! name: Team Hagerty
subject: #TeamHagerty Stands With President Trump Against Communist China
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-jy/)
# April 14, 2020
**" The Communist Chinese Regime Is Responsible For The Crime Of The Century"**With the news reports indicating that the U.S. State Department warned about a research lab in Wuhan, China studying coronavirus in bats more than two years ago, Bill released a statement slamming the Communist Chinese regime. The new reports make it clear that Communist China prioritized a public relations campaign over a public health campaign - at the expense of the world's health and economy. To read Bill's full statement, click **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-r/)** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-y/) **WATCH: Bill on Fox Business with Lou Dobbs** An outspoken critic of the Communist Chinese regime's handling of the Wuhan coronavirus, Bill joined Lou Dobbs on Fox Business last week to discuss China's misrepresentation of valuable data related to the coronavirus, saying "they must be held accountable." Watch above as Bill calls the actions of Communist China the "crime of the century." **ICYMI: Read Bill's Latest Op-Ed in the Times Free Press** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-j/) Last week a U.S. intelligence report confirmed that China's government placed regime control over the health of its citizens who were suffering from the highly contagious coronavirus that broke out in Wuhan, China, by "under-reporting both total cases and deaths it's suffered from the disease." To read more about how Bill plans to support President Trump in his efforts to push back against Communist China, read his latest editorial in the _Chattanooga Times Free Press_ **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-t/)**
## **Be a Part of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-i/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-d/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-h/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-k/) **Bill Hagerty: China Guilty of 'The Greatest Cover-Up in Human History'**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-u/) **Hagerty Calls China's Handling of Coronavirus 'Crime of the Century'**[The Epoch Times:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-m/) **Beijing's Coverup of CCP Virus 'Crime of the Century,' Says Former US Ambassador to Japan**[Yahoo Finance:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-c/)** [VIDEO]: Coronavirus is 'the crime of the century': Former US ambassador to Japan
## **What They're Saying...**
> _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-q/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-a/) _" After looking Bill in the eye, I can fully vouch for the fact that he is a pro-life, Second Amendment custodian in full support of our president's agenda. Without hesitation, I intend to support and vote for him and humbly ask that you do as well."_
> _[-](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-f/)_[ Jeff Broyles](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty will work with President Trump, just as he did while Ambassador to Japan, to protect our farmers and make sure that they are treated fairly when it comes to trade. He has my support to be Tennessee's next Senator."_
> [-Mayor Rick Graham](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" Bill Hagerty is running for the United States Senate to combat the radical socialists and their agenda. I know Bill will stand with President Donald Trump to protect my conservative values and the conservative values of so many Tennesseans across the state."_
> [-Michael Tedder](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" That's why it's very important that we send a senator to Washington, D.C., who understands how dangerous this is and who will stop the Democrats' extremely liberal agenda. I believe that representative is Bill Hagerty, a fiscal conservative running for the United States Senate who is endorsed by President Trump."_
> [-Kenneth Eaton](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" I am supporting Bill Hagerty for Senate because he will continue fighting for family-owned farms, like mine, to ensure we have the resources necessary to compete on a global scale and win."_
> [-Charlotte Kelley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-w/) _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-yd/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-yh/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-yk/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-yu/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-jl/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-jr/)
---|---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215
[ Share ](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-fb-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-jj/)
[ Tweet ](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-tw-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-jt/)
[ Forward ](https://hfs.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-fuutjhhtj-76178D70-nujkjhl-l-ji)
[Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-nujkjhl-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-jd) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-u-nujkjhl-fuutjhhtj-jh/)

body:
| |
# With seven weeks to go until the Primary,
# voting has started in Pennsylvania.
Today marks the middle of April. _As of today, 173,115 Democrats have requested their vote-by-mail ballots!_ I would like to thank all of those who are making sure their voice is heard in this important primary election, no matter what happens with the COVID-19 crisis. Any day now, these voters will be receiving their ballots in the mail. That means that our campaign must communicate with those voters before they complete and return their ballots. More than ever, it is important that we keep our fundraising on track. **We need your help to meet our mid-month goal and begin communicating with those who are already casting their ballots. Can you make a contribution now to make sure we meet our goals and communicate with these voters?** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Lo7ToojxzBpgPr1YEn33oioHQ78etqKWiquMaLUVWhY=/2lT1MNYwCOO7CI5DAAwFsBla9GzvyyEXw2mIgT9202I=) **Now is a critical time for our campaign, and I can 't thank you enough for your generous support. Together, we will win this election and bring real change to Harrisburg. ** Thanks for your support, Nina Learn more by visiting our website: [**_www.NinaForPA.com_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Lo7ToojxzBpgPr1YEn33oioHQ78etqKWiquMaLUVWhY=/IUQ0UMx8y4JldD90YEAGmcWRnKlvHD2V_1Npi6inW2w=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Lo7ToojxzBpgPr1YEn33oioHQ78etqKWiquMaLUVWhY=/2lT1MNYwCOO7CI5DAAwFsBla9GzvyyEXw2mIgT9202I=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Lo7ToojxzBpgPr1YEn33oioHQ78etqKWiquMaLUVWhY=/lpyPJEsZdgUl7OsC6aR9-eivAORlN3sHm2r2Gj1tI8c=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Lo7ToojxzBpgPr1YEn33oioHQ78etqKWiquMaLUVWhY=/EIP_AFZ43c3GkMS-vOUJpoJkf9iNuDiMY5EwvPnsSTk=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Lo7ToojxzBpgPr1YEn33oioHQ78etqKWiquMaLUVWhY=/3YmDM_bGOWRFQ_rXDWCXyTcyh_4r1fqk8WdvgsekaXU=?hl=en)

clean_body: | | With seven weeks to go until the Primary, voting has started in Pennsylvania. Today marks the middle of April. As of today, 173,115 Democrats have requested their vote-by-mail ballots! I would like to thank all of those who are making sure their voice is heard in this important primary election, no matter what happens with the COVID-19 crisis. Any day now, these voters will be receiving their ballots in the mail. That means that our campaign must communicate with those voters before they complete and return their ballots. More than ever, it is important that we keep our fundraising on track. We need your help to meet our mid-month goal and begin communicating with those who are already casting their ballots. Can you make a contribution now to make sure we meet our goals and communicate with these voters? = Now is a critical time for our campaign, and I can 't thank you enough for your generous support. Together, we will win this election and bring real change to Harrisburg. Thanks for your support, Nina Learn more by visiting our website: = = Follow us on Social Media: = = Copyright (C) Nina for PA. All rights reserved. name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 4/14
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
[](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkdjikk-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| As we enter another week of worry and uncertainty in our state, it's easy to get bogged down by all the negativity surrounding this disease and the tornadoes that have ravaged parts of our state. I hope you'll join Maya and me in praying for those affected by this week's tornadoes across Southeast Tennesseee. We've endured a lot as a state in the past two months, but together, we will get through this! I know many of you are worried about this virus and the impact it will have on your health, your loved ones, and the economy. While these are tumultuous times, there is no need to panic. Continue to practice social distancing, wash your hands often, and enjoy time with your family. If you have any questions, or are worried, or I can help in any way please feel free to email me directly at [manny@drmannyforsenate.com](http://manny@drmannyforsenate.com). **News: ** The Chinese government is directly responsible for this pandemic and we must hold them accountable. We cannot continue to rely on the Communist Chinese government for our neccessary medical supplies. [Read my Op-Ed in the _Times Free Press_ here](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkdjikk-olhhkyhhid-j/). [I also really enjoyed Roy Exum's column this week in _The Chattanoogan_.](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkdjikk-olhhkyhhid-t/) **Social Media:** JB and Leela baked cookies and drew pictures for our neighborhood Kroger associates who are still working despite the pandemic. We want to thank all of our essential workers who are still working! Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkdjikk-olhhkyhhid-i/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkdjikk-olhhkyhhid-d/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkdjikk-olhhkyhhid-h/) to keep up with all that we are doing during this pandemic. We aren't slowing this campaign down as we work towards victory in August! **COVID-19 Resources:** There are many resources at your disposal. I urge you to order take-out, donate blood, and above all, pray for our country during this time. Also please adhere to the guidelines being put forth by [President Trump](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkdjikk-olhhkyhhid-k/), [Governor Lee](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkdjikk-olhhkyhhid-u/), and [the CDC](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkdjikk-olhhkyhhid-o/). One of the most important things any of us can do is to go give blood! I know you are all worried. There is a light at the end of the tunnel, and we will get there together. Stay safe out there. I'm praying for all of us! Dr. Manny P.S. I know you don't want to be hearing from politicians right now. That is one reason we need to send political outsiders to Washington. Please consider donating to our campaign to send me to Washington to represent you in the US Senate! [DoNATe herE](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhkdjikk-olhhkyhhid-b/) Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

name: Charles Booker
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
I grew up in one of the poorest zip codes in Kentucky. Both of my parents had to drop out of high school to help take care of my brothers and sisters.
#
Hi,
My team told me we’re just $2,200 short of hitting our mid-month fundraising goal.
They suggested I reach out and tell you why you should chip in to our campaign before the deadline tonight.
**So I’m going to share my story with you.** It’s important that you know why I jumped into this fight to defeat Mitch McConnell if I’m going to ask you to give whatever you can to support our progressive movement.
**[When you finish reading, will you chip in $5 to our grassroots campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17148637/184355205/-608415111?refcode=em20200415&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmM4NGIzZi0zMjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SwPRan3I_qu2AvlcN0lNi12VbwSjRieXOVSyvH1AdHM=)**
****[chip in defeat mitch& read my story](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17148638/184355206/-608415111?refcode=em20200415&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmM4NGIzZi0zMjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SwPRan3I_qu2AvlcN0lNi12VbwSjRieXOVSyvH1AdHM=)****
**I grew up in one of the poorest zip codes in Kentucky.** Both of my parents had to drop out of high school to help take care of my brothers and sisters. We sometimes had to go without heat in the winter or air conditioning in the summer. My mom often went without eating so that I could.
_But my family wasn’t alone in their struggles. _
**We’re just a single example of the thousands of families in Kentucky who’ve been left behind by Mitch McConnell’s politics and have felt the impact of his profits-over-people policies. **
Mitch’s reign in Kentucky has resulted in generations of families struggling to make ends meet. For decades, he has fought to cut health care benefits while giving handouts to CEOs and arguing that families like mine didn’t need help.
So I got involved in public service because I believed Kentuckians deserved better and that things could get better. I became the youngest black legislator in Kentucky in 90 years. And all around me, I started seeing evidence that change is possible. I saw my grandparents open up their home to foster care. I saw my neighbors fighting back on the picket line. I saw my uncle become an advocate after my cousin’s murder.
**Now, I’m taking my fight for a brighter future for Kentuckians to Mitch McConnell.** Political experts are saying that this election is the strongest chance we’ve had in years to kick out Mitch and elect real change for our state.
**[Will you seize this chance and chip in $5 to support our grassroots campaign? I know change is possible, but first, we need to raise the funds we need to spread our bold, progressive message.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17148652/184355220/-608415111?refcode=em20200415&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmM4NGIzZi0zMjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SwPRan3I_qu2AvlcN0lNi12VbwSjRieXOVSyvH1AdHM=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17148653/184355221/-608415111?refcode=em20200415&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmM4NGIzZi0zMjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SwPRan3I_qu2AvlcN0lNi12VbwSjRieXOVSyvH1AdHM=)****
For years, Democrats have tried to challenge Mitch and failed.
They ran middle-of-the-road campaigns that didn’t speak to the struggles families like mine faced growing up. They were scared of angering the special interest groups and big money donors that have dominated our elections. They had lots to say, but no real plan for change.
We’re not making that mistake. We’re fighting for bold, powerful solutions like Medicare for All, a universal basic income, and tuition-free public college because nothing will really change unless we start doing things differently.
**Mitch is terrified because he knows we’re the first campaign to run against him on a message like this.** He’s attacking us on Twitter and planning the biggest attack ads campaign we’ve ever seen in a Senate race.
**[We’re on the right path to victory. But first, we need just enough money to make sure we can execute our plan. We don’t rely on corporate PACs or billionaires — we’re counting on you. Can you chip in even just $5 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17148654/184355222/-608415111?refcode=em20200415&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmM4NGIzZi0zMjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SwPRan3I_qu2AvlcN0lNi12VbwSjRieXOVSyvH1AdHM=)**
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17148655/184355223/-608415111?refcode=em20200415&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmM4NGIzZi0zMjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SwPRan3I_qu2AvlcN0lNi12VbwSjRieXOVSyvH1AdHM=)****
Thanks for reading my story. I hope it was a good enough reason to chip in.
Charles
_P.S. Our hearts go out to anyone struggling right now to make ends meet. Please take care of yourself — we only ask you to donate if you can afford to. Your support already means a lot to us._

clean_body: I grew up in one of the poorest zip codes in Kentucky. Both of my parents had to drop out of high school to help take care of my brothers and sisters. Hi, My team told me we’re just $2,200 short of hitting our mid-month fundraising goal. They suggested I reach out and tell you why you should chip in to our campaign before the deadline tonight. So I’m going to share my story with you. It’s important that you know why I jumped into this fight to defeat Mitch McConnell if I’m going to ask you to give whatever you can to support our progressive movement. = **= I grew up in one of the poorest zip codes in Kentucky. Both of my parents had to drop out of high school to help take care of my brothers and sisters. We sometimes had to go without heat in the winter or air conditioning in the summer. My mom often went without eating so that I could. But my family wasn’t alone in their struggles. We’re just a single example of the thousands of families in Kentucky who’ve been left behind by Mitch McConnell’s politics and have felt the impact of his profits-over-people policies. Mitch’s reign in Kentucky has resulted in generations of families struggling to make ends meet. For decades, he has fought to cut health care benefits while giving handouts to CEOs and arguing that families like mine didn’t need help. So I got involved in public service because I believed Kentuckians deserved better and that things could get better. I became the youngest black legislator in Kentucky in 90 years. And all around me, I started seeing evidence that change is possible. I saw my grandparents open up their home to foster care. I saw my neighbors fighting back on the picket line. I saw my uncle become an advocate after my cousin’s murder. Now, I’m taking my fight for a brighter future for Kentuckians to Mitch McConnell. Political experts are saying that this election is the strongest chance we’ve had in years to kick out Mitch and elect real change for our state. = = For years, Democrats have tried to challenge Mitch and failed. They ran middle-of-the-road campaigns that didn’t speak to the struggles families like mine faced growing up. They were scared of angering the special interest groups and big money donors that have dominated our elections. They had lots to say, but no real plan for change. We’re not making that mistake. We’re fighting for bold, powerful solutions like Medicare for All, a universal basic income, and tuition-free public college because nothing will really change unless we start doing things differently. Mitch is terrified because he knows we’re the first campaign to run against him on a message like this. He’s attacking us on Twitter and planning the biggest attack ads campaign we’ve ever seen in a Senate race. = = Thanks for reading my story. I hope it was a good enough reason to chip in. Charles P.S. Our hearts go out to anyone struggling right now to make ends meet. Please take care of yourself — we only ask you to donate if you can afford to. Your support already means a lot to us. =** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

The campaign we’re building here is incredible. Our opponent is the most vulnerable Republican Senator in the country. We’re one of the most likely races to flip a seat and take back the Senate majority for Democrats. **It’s clear folks are ready to fight for our shared values.**
But Washington Republicans just announced several massive ad buys -- $67 million from Mitch McConnell’s shady super PAC, $33 million from the National Republican Senatorial Committee, and a seven-figure ad buy from the Republican National Committee.
**This will be one of the most expensive election cycles in Colorado history.** Plus, we’re at a serious cash-on-hand disadvantage. We’ll need a surge in grassroots donations this week if we want our message to cut above the noise and reach voters.
**If you can, will you donate $10 or more toward our campaign to flip Colorado’s Senate seat blue? Our mid-month deadline is in just 48 hours and we can’t meet it without you.**

clean_body: | We’ll be direct, folks: With just 48 hours until our mid-April fundraising deadline, we’re behind on hitting our goal for the month. Will you add a donation to John’s campaign for U.S. Senate before our Friday deadline? Anything you’re able to give right now will make a huge difference in our race to flip Colorado’s Senate seat: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = The campaign we’re building here is incredible. Our opponent is the most vulnerable Republican Senator in the country. We’re one of the most likely races to flip a seat and take back the Senate majority for Democrats. It’s clear folks are ready to fight for our shared values. But Washington Republicans just announced several massive ad buys -- $67 million from Mitch McConnell’s shady super PAC, $33 million from the National Republican Senatorial Committee, and a seven-figure ad buy from the Republican National Committee. This will be one of the most expensive election cycles in Colorado history. Plus, we’re at a serious cash-on-hand disadvantage. We’ll need a surge in grassroots donations this week if we want our message to cut above the noise and reach voters. If you can, will you donate $10 or more toward our campaign to flip Colorado’s Senate seat blue? Our mid-month deadline is in just 48 hours and we can’t meet it without you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for anything you’re able to give. John is refusing to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, which means we truly can’t do this without you. — Team Hick Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado Hickenlooper for Colorado PO Box 18886 Denver, CO 80218 United States

| Derek I am so happy to announce that former Arkansas Governor and Republican Presidential Candidate Mike Huckabee has endorsed my campaign!
Governor Huckabee's underdog presidential campaign in 2008 was built on **bringing together a strong grassroots network of conservative Republicans and preaching a bright, hopeful message**. He was vastly outspent by Washington DC Swamp money - but he was never outworked. That's why his campaign was so successful. I have no doubt that my opponents in this race will also raise piles of DC Swamp money and that we will be outspent. However,**I promise that much like Governor Huckabee, we will not be outworked and our grassroots campaign will be second to none!** [Will you join Governor Mike Huckabee and help us build our grassroots campaign to unseat Chris Pappas by chipping in $15, $25 or even $100?](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzk5OTUxNjI1NTY0NDYwNDA1JmM9ZTRxMyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzgxMjA3MzgmZD10N3cxbzNk.o1XQn4QrhLGjoqvls7RByzceW2m-ZiFWsIP828VziYo) Thank you for your support! \- Matt
---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
"When I first ran for President in 2008, one of the first people I met was Matt Mayberry, a man who would become and remain a dear personal friend as well as political ally. Matt is one of the hardest workers I’ve seen in 30 years of being in politics. He is a rarity in the political world—he has a servant’s heart and does his work selflessly and without regard to whether he’s recognized or compensated for what his labor is worth. He is a person of actual principled conviction. The people of New Hampshire would be very fortunate to have Matt Mayberry in Congress. For that matter, we ALL would be fortunate to have someone of his character serve. When others seek the spotlight, Matt seeks the task others don’t want to do because it is done in obscurity." "With great joy, I enthusiastically endorse Matt Mayberry and respectfully ask you to vote for him and support him financially as I am doing both personally and through my PAC." "Matt will consistently put others first. He always has. I believe he always will." - Mike Huckabee

Friend,

This isn't easy to say. We're approaching our mid-month deadline, and we are disastrously behind where we need to be. **We need to raise $4,102 by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT if we want to compete in November.**

[**CHIP IN $10 BY MIDNIGHT TONIGHT**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zWPUQ8oG6AR5wfBGI0v4FAo9hY5GJ5ynqstC_9QhrPzN-iV6DnZd4RP4TwXPUw0PXFmYZRiznHJHrPW2OabnXnVzdGAzh403uFsnI2gqX7yVlmzFF8zsgFiQh7ERvvMlA__ZV--RzcpVxIjuinPydzDTzimXI4qDdjhAPchBJoqRK1cHIo8zW-5U_SZcjsweloPlJDh5yMMAaytRcgk3YkTdOnZ4WS99Twzhhd9422mFCgZ6LKTaRnUfV5FsOuhKt8mMOt3Fh2TOvxVR9XoQun2_7FRl44HWrmFy6FvNIhJ5_VAmQ4N_TdjAVXdySx7zed6NoCieefMNZ9DNMYlr6jKfEWKYUTvm9ijxi-ZwzqCl2iVoIxv6O1VwldhonYIxn9Rw5utBOV8=&c=XA2axvRYXn-P0wDukHEnucCKcpPr2h8Bliy0tmowAUkx0JPhNKoz5Q==&ch=X2lRJ4P6SO31hNljR4nyI6dRSdco0Lnvpzwo6UFvPqJWa9ZCpJs2dQ==)
This race is a toss-up and will be decided by just a handful of votes. We're already facing the slimmest of margins, and we can't slip any farther behind. To catch up, we need to pick up the pace.

Michelle has spent her life fighting for tax fairness and small businesses, and she led the fight to return $400 million to California taxpayers. She's ready to take this fight to Washington, but she can't do it alone.

[**CHIP IN $10 BY MIDNIGHT TONIGHT**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zWPUQ8oG6AR5wfBGI0v4FAo9hY5GJ5ynqstC_9QhrPzN-iV6DnZd4RP4TwXPUw0PXFmYZRiznHJHrPW2OabnXnVzdGAzh403uFsnI2gqX7yVlmzFF8zsgFiQh7ERvvMlA__ZV--RzcpVxIjuinPydzDTzimXI4qDdjhAPchBJoqRK1cHIo8zW-5U_SZcjsweloPlJDh5yMMAaytRcgk3YkTdOnZ4WS99Twzhhd9422mFCgZ6LKTaRnUfV5FsOuhKt8mMOt3Fh2TOvxVR9XoQun2_7FRl44HWrmFy6FvNIhJ5_VAmQ4N_TdjAVXdySx7zed6NoCieefMNZ9DNMYlr6jKfEWKYUTvm9ijxi-ZwzqCl2iVoIxv6O1VwldhonYIxn9Rw5utBOV8=&c=XA2axvRYXn-P0wDukHEnucCKcpPr2h8Bliy0tmowAUkx0JPhNKoz5Q==&ch=X2lRJ4P6SO31hNljR4nyI6dRSdco0Lnvpzwo6UFvPqJWa9ZCpJs2dQ==)
These last two months, we've fallen behind. And with everything on the line, we need to kick it into high gear.
We knew this fight wouldn't be easy, and we knew we would have to fight every day -- but we also knew we wouldn't have to fight alone.

**[If you are able, can we count on you to chip in to help us restore conservative leadership in Washington? Every donation, no matter the size, makes a direct and immediate impact on this campaign.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zWPUQ8oG6AR5wfBGI0v4FAo9hY5GJ5ynqstC_9QhrPzN-iV6DnZd4RP4TwXPUw0PBLZfrjo85C5imG1jYkHLcV87vlzfaiTEsVDwPqb8T5UN_w0mkSqC3haFBZ6E-S7F6HS-Pr9GrzKp8TunIWnpw7cGbSC2G2dd2cJWRX_x4KMmfsFbCuOdbMldnedRpGIOcCmeL4KSrDnVWryH9ZYNAbTNq84nBR_jhjtdA9klfgIDAeX2l3Odk3nz4ykJ3f-fykq_GRz-kpoe61nIRK7gkEsY_L0kxKTUuhVyWUsDnpxR24KRY4UlFFtDoEaAq-3GSKW456BFnob_qxkJxWrh7hi7qfg4ZBcMO0_-SepHB6Vo2rfb2oNvMITAWv7jD6wfS7Zily9tTkA=&c=XA2axvRYXn-P0wDukHEnucCKcpPr2h8Bliy0tmowAUkx0JPhNKoz5Q==&ch=X2lRJ4P6SO31hNljR4nyI6dRSdco0Lnvpzwo6UFvPqJWa9ZCpJs2dQ==)**

clean_body: We're approaching our mid-month deadline and we are disastrously behind where we need to be. == == Friend, This isn't easy to say. We're approaching our mid-month deadline, and we are disastrously behind where we need to be. We need to raise $4,102 by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT if we want to compete in November. == This race is a toss-up and will be decided by just a handful of votes. We're already facing the slimmest of margins, and we can't slip any farther behind. To catch up, we need to pick up the pace. Michelle has spent her life fighting for tax fairness and small businesses, and she led the fight to return $400 million to California taxpayers. She's ready to take this fight to Washington, but she can't do it alone. == These last two months, we've fallen behind. And with everything on the line, we need to kick it into high gear. We knew this fight wouldn't be easy, and we knew we would have to fight every day -- but we also knew we wouldn't have to fight alone. == Thank you, Steph Team Steel Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress 3010 Old Ranch Pkwy Suite 260 Seal Beach, CA 90740 == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 3010 Old Ranch Pkwy Suite 260, Seal Beach, CA 90740 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

name: Gary Peters
subject: Joe Biden.

body:
| | |

Folks,

I wanted you to be the first to hear it from me: **I 'm proud to endorse Joe Biden for President.**

We need a President that's ready to create real, effective change for everyday Americans -- a proven leader like Joe.**[It's why I'm asking you, friend, to donate to Joe Biden and our campaign now.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da7b5/5721a3ed/7f9bb0ed/efbfbf4/2470026364/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJiX2djcCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzkzLWZyLWluLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jrb_gcp?refcode=jtk393-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

---
| | [Rush another amount](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da7b5/5721a3ed/7f9bb0ed/efbfbf0/2470026364/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJiX2djcCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzkzLWZyLWluLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiImcmVjdXJyaW5nPTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jrb_gcp?refcode=jtk393-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")
---
Now more than ever, we need a steady leader that can bring our country together to find common ground and solve the tough challenges ahead of us.

From the beginning, I've said our Democratic nominee should put Michigan and the issues that matter to our state first.

We need a president ready to lower the cost of prescription drugs, protect our Great Lakes and increase skills training to create more opportunities for good-paying jobs. And I'm supporting Joe Biden because I believe he's the person that will do just that.

Joe has always been there for Michigan. From standing with our state in rescuing the auto industry which has led the way to more good-paying jobs, to providing economic stimulus to guide our communities out of the financial crisis -- he's shown that he'll continue to be a champion for Michigan middle class families and our workers.

But we're going to be up against a massive GOP war chest this November, and the Republicans know that Michigan is where the battle for the soul of our nation will be fought. With disinformation and hundreds of millions of dollars funded by far-right dark-money groups, Joe and I are going to need an army of grassroots donors like you to stand with us.

**Can Joe and I count on you?[Make a donation between Joe Biden and our campaign today to solidify victory in Michigan this year.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da7b5/5721a3ed/7f9bb0ed/efbfbf4/2470026364/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJiX2djcCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzkzLWZyLWluLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jrb_gcp?refcode=jtk393-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

With your help, we'll restore the soul of America -- together.

Thank you,
Gary

body:
Time and time again Democrats have played political games with the American people. They are playing politics with this deadly pandemic. Instead of helping they are holding the American people and businesses across the country hostage, they should be working with President Trump to get America back on its feet.

Time and time again Democrats have played political games with the American people.

name: Mark Warner for Senate
subject: We need oversight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Add your name if you agree we need oversight for coronavirus stimulus funds.
|
---
| | Derek --

The Coronavirus Aid, Relief, and Economic Security (CARES) Act provided desperately needed funds for struggling Americans and for small and mid-sized businesses. In the Senate, Mark's priorities for this law have been to get aid quickly to the people who need it most and to include strong accountability measures to prevent waste, fraud, and abuse by bad actors.

This taxpayer money should be used for coronavirus relief, not shareholder bailouts, CEO salaries, or political favors. **But in the weeks since it became law, President Trump has been working to undermine these crucial accountability measures. That's why Mark Warner needs your help today.

[Will you add your name to Mark's petition calling for accountability and oversight on coronavirus relief stimulus funds?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d51a/53d9897e/54d773f2/1c8863d6/3880181405/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-oversightlgft")**

Just the other day, the President fired the federal watchdog chosen to oversee the stimulus package money. With Donald Trump now exerting his personal influence over the coronavirus stimulus, we can't let political interference in our nation's pandemic response go unchecked.

[**Add your name if you agree we need oversight for coronavirus stimulus funds.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d51a/53d9897e/54d773f2/1c8863d6/3880181405/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-oversightlgft")

We can't let the president undo the critical oversight and protections Mark and his colleagues in the Senate fought to include in the CARES Act. The point of passing this package was to get aid to those who need it in the wake of the pandemic. We need independent oversight to make sure funds are distributed appropriately, especially with a stimulus package of this size. By firing the acting inspector general, **Trump is signaling that he 's unwilling to do what's necessary to provide oversight on the stimulus package.

[Will you sign Mark's petition demanding that the administration allow accountability and transparency over the CARES Act?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d51a/53d9897e/54d773f2/1c8863d6/3880181405/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-oversightlgft")**

-- Team Warner

| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d51a/53d9897e/54d773f2/1c8863d5/3880181405/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200415lgft_p_1_fl__541__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: Keep Us in the Fight!
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
## COVID19 affects us all, and we deserve a Representative who keeps our welfare above their own self-interests.
Our fight is about supporting policies that place people over profit. In this time of crisis, we must come together as a community to support the changes we feel will help the greater whole, not the wealthy few.
In order for us to fight back, our campaign is in need of better funding. We’ve had a drop off in fundraising during the pandemic, and I understand why. Too many people in this district have lost their jobs or had their hours substantially cut. Our movement relies on their kindness and generosity, but they simply cannot spare any money right now. Many of you are not being stressed financially during these times, and right now, we need you to help make up what others aren’t able to give. This pandemic highlights our need for politicians with compassion, and we simply will not get that from our current representative. Help us fight back. Thank you.

* * *
## Community News
Our campaign hopes everyone is able to take care of themselves and stay safe in these trying times. If you have free time, please check out local organizations within your and in surrounding communities who are doing great work in helping vulnerable families get the supplies they need. If you would like to get involved, below are two organizations we know that are doing some amazing work. Do you know any others we should know about? Send us details at info@iantoddforcongress.com or msg us on Facebook, Twitter, or Instagram.
* [St. Cloud Prepper Pals](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=f6411ce56b&e=c56804a14d)
* [Asamblea de Derechos Civiles](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=3693080b87&e=c56804a14d)

* * *
## Campaign News
Be on the lookout for our new Podcast "On Your 6th", starring our very own Ian Todd. We have released three so far and they can be found on our website [here](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=e96ccb17bf&e=c56804a14d).

Also, be sure to catch our new upcoming weekly Facebook Livestreams every Friday from 5pm to 530pm CST! Ian will be going over various topics of interest and will be available to take any questions.

Need early spring yard decorations? Get a Todd yard sign! Swag available [here](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=411dee5add&e=c56804a14d).
* * *

He’s called himself a Trump “whisperer” and “co-pilot.” Now this erratic, unstable president is creating chaos at a time of crisis, and Georgia’s Senator Perdue is derelict in his duty by enabling it. **We must defeat Perdue.**

Perdue stood by Trump’s ‘shithole countries’ racism, his invitation of foreign interference into our elections, and his reckless tax cuts that have blown up our national debt and are directly undermining our pandemic response right now. **While Trump refuses to lead during a time of public health and economic crisis, Perdue uses classified coronavirus information to self-deal in the stock market.**

The president’s claim of “total authority” over our country and 50 states is breathtakingly wrong and dangerous, but I’m not counting on David Perdue remaining true to his so-called “small government” philosophy or finally standing up to this president. **So I’m standing up to both of them.**

**[I need you with me in order to win. We need to raise $3,436 before midnight to hit our mid-month goal and not fall behind before the next FEC deadline. We’ve built so much momentum already — now we need to come after these unfit leaders with everything we’ve got. Cornyn has been laser-focused on repealing the Affordable Care Act, voting to defund or repeal it 20 times since it became law!**

This isn't the time for a senator who won't support Texans' access to health care. **It 's clear we need new leadership in Texas** \-- but with all of our in-person events suspended, MJ is counting on our online grassroots team more than ever. **If you 're able, pitch in to help us reach our $25,000 mid-month goal and elect a senator who'll fight for working families!**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: My endorsement for president
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
From the bottom of my heart, I'm grateful that you've fought by my side. And even though I'm not running for president anymore, our work goes on -- there's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines in | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b6/45c30650/1f418a0e3/66e96234/2799245052/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
From the bottom of my heart, I'm grateful that you've fought by my side.

And even though I'm not running for president anymore, our work goes on -- there's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines in the fight against Donald Trump.

That's why today I'm proud to endorse Joe Biden for president of the United States.

He grew up on the ragged edge of the middle class in Scranton, he committed to public service early in life, and he never stopped serving -- facing unspeakable tragedy with fortitude and grace.

These experiences animate him and the empathy he extends to Americans who are struggling -- no matter what their story.

Empathy matters. And, in this moment of crisis, it's more important than ever that the next president restores America's faith in good, effective government.

Joe Biden has spent nearly his entire life in public service. He knows that a government run with integrity, competence, and heart will save lives and save livelihoods. And we can't afford to let Donald Trump continue to endanger the lives and livelihoods of every American.

**[If you agree that we need Joe Biden to be the next president of the United States, add your name-- and let's keep fighting for the better America we can build after defeating Donald Trump.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b6/45c30650/1f418a0e3/66e96237/2799245052/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExM1BfQU5OX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNDE1X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-biden?source=EMQ13P_ANN_END_E_20200415_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

I've seen the vice president help a community heal. Six years ago today, one year to the day after the Boston Marathon bombings that tore up bodies and tore at our sense of safety and community, he was right here. People who'd been hurt, people who were afraid -- he gave them peace, he gave them grace. I watched it up close.

Now, when Donald Trump is gone, we will need to do more than heal a nation that has been bitterly divided. We will need to rebuild and transform our country.

And I've seen Joe Biden help a nation rebuild.

In 2009, President Obama put him in charge of leading the implementation of the historic Recovery Act to help our economy and help working families.

During the recovery, and later when I worked at the White House setting up the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, I saw him up close, doing the work, getting in the weeds --- never forgetting who we were all there to serve.

Among all the other candidates I competed with in the Democratic primary this year, there's no one who I've agreed with 100% of the time over the years.

But one thing I appreciate about Joe Biden is that he will always tell you where he stands. When you disagree, he'll listen -- not just listen, but really hear you. And treat you with respect, no matter where you're coming from. And he has shown throughout this campaign that when you come with new facts or a good argument, he's not too afraid or too proud to be persuaded.

Joe Biden was there the very moment I became a senator -- he swore me in. And when he did, he said, "You gave me hell! And you're gonna do a great job."

Because that's the thing about Joe: He wants you in the fight with him. And when you're in the fight with Joe at your side, you know you have a partner who's deeply committed to getting something good done for this country.

**Joe Biden is a selfless public servant. He 's committed to the fight for social, racial, and economic justice. And he will lead a government that works for the American people.**

**[And now, it's up to all of us to make Joe Biden the next president of the United States. So let's get to work. Add your name to say you're in this fight.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b6/45c30650/1f418a0e3/66e96237/2799245052/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExM1BfQU5OX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNDE1X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-biden?source=EMQ13P_ANN_END_E_20200415_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b6/45c30650/1f418a0e3/66e96237/2799245052/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExM1BfQU5OX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNDE1X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-biden?source=EMQ13P_ANN_END_E_20200415_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Now, when Donald Trump is gone, we will need to do more than heal a nation that has been bitterly divided. We will need to rebuild and transform our country. And I've seen Joe Biden help a nation rebuild. In 2009, President Obama put him in charge of leading the implementation of the historic Recovery Act to help our economy and help working families. During the recovery, and later when I worked at the White House setting up the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, I saw him up close, doing the work, getting in the weeds --- never forgetting who we were all there to serve. Among all the other candidates I competed with in the Democratic primary this year, there's no one who I've agreed with 100% of the time over the years. But one thing I appreciate about Joe Biden is that he will always tell you where he stands. When you disagree, he'll listen -- not just listen, but really hear you. And treat you with respect, no matter where you're coming from. And he has shown throughout this campaign that when you come with new facts or a good argument, he's not too afraid or too proud to be persuaded. Joe Biden was there the very moment I became a senator -- he swore me in. And when he did, he said, "You gave me hell! And you're gonna do a great job." Because that's the thing about Joe: He wants you in the fight with him. And when you're in the fight with Joe at your side, you know you have a partner who's deeply committed to getting something good done for this country. Joe Biden is a selfless public servant. He 's committed to the fight for social, racial, and economic justice. And he will lead a government that works for the American people. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: What day would this have been?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANET BARRESI FOR CONGRESS
body:
let's dig in to some questions | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/af6d2d11c9b0/calling-all-patriots-12307290?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=13a9fee0d6&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [Are your taxes too high?](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ef5b9679cd&e=795c6d9796 "Are your taxes too high?")
---
| Peter,

It's **April 15th.**

I think we all know what that means -- this would have been the dreaded **Tax Day.**

But of course due to the COVID-19 pandemic, we find ourselves under some special circumstances. Nonetheless, it's still good to think about a few important questions:

Do we pay too much of our hard-earned money in taxes?

Is our tax system way too complicated?

And does the government spend the money we pay effectively?

Just look at the $2 trillion coronavirus relief bill (CARES Act). Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats, backed by Kendra Horn, knew this was a must-pass urgent bill. So they stuffed a lot of unnecessary, wasteful and just downright ridiculous pork projects into the bill, like $25 million for the Kennedy Center.

**I don't know about you, but I still think $25 MILLION is a lot of money!**

So the package passed because there was "no time" to fight it out on the floor of the United States Congress. People needed relief, and Pelosi exploited them for it. That's a **shameful abuse of taxpayer dollars.**

That's one of the reasons why I signed the anti-tax pledge from Americans for Tax Reform. We have to make the **tax code a LOT simpler** and we need to let taxpayers **keep more of their hard-earned money.**
---
| [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=a574797943&e=795c6d9796)
---
| When Kendra Horn ran for Congress, she tried to paint herself as a "moderate"—someone interested in helping the middle-class succeed.

You sure wouldn’t know it by her votes. She has stood with Nancy Pelosi to oppose President Trump's middle-class tax cuts. And has voted with Pelosi 85% of the time overall.

When I’m elected to Congress, I’m going to fight to make the Trump tax cuts permanent.

[Will you join our campaign to make these middle-class tax cuts permanent and send a conservative to Washington? **Donating just $5, $15, $25, $50, or even $100 makes a big difference and will be key to beating Kendra Horn's leftist millions.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=a3bcad6932&e=795c6d9796)

We need to elect a strong conservative to run against Kendra Horn. Otherwise, we won't stand a chance against the big money machine gearing up to keep another Pelosi rubber-stamp in office.

[**Please consider donating just $5, $15, $25, $50, or even $100 to help fight back against one of Pelosi's top allies in Congress. Thank you.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=cadec4e9bf&e=795c6d9796) Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=81603e7742&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi
---
| [Help fight for lower, simpler taxes](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f9d93f54ce&e=795c6d9796 "Help fight for lower, simpler taxes")
---
| | | | | | | [](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=10a24d3b42&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ce94f4e641&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=bb7cb89f3d&e=795c6d9796)
---

Janet for CongressPO Box 20147Oklahoma City, OK 73156-0147

Want to change how you receive these emails?

In this morning's Politico Playbook, they reported that the latest poll from Public Policy Polling has 314 endorsed candidate **Dr. Barbara Bollier LEADING Kris Kobach by 2%_(but still within the margin of error)._**

Here is the thing -- for the GOP, they will see this as a sign that they have to attack Democrat Barbara Bollier with EVERYTHING they've got to try and keep the race close.

They know that Kobach is a damaged candidate -- in 2018, he lost the governor's race to a Democrat for the first time in over a decade. The same Kris Kobach whose extreme voter suppression tactics and anti-immigration views make him one of the most extreme Senate candidates this cycle. Regardless, Republicans will spend BIG to try and save this Senate Seat.

name: John Cornyn
subject: FW: Biden….
body:
Friend, I just wanted to make sure you saw the quote below. **"I think you're going to turn Texas Blue."**
-Joe Biden September 14, 2019 in Dallas, Texas With Joe Biden recently becoming the presumptive Dem nominee, money will be POURING into his coffers.
And, if his statements in the past are any indication, he'll be making flipping Texas blue a major staple of his campaign. He'll direct MILLIONS of those funds right into the Lone Star State.
**[So, Friend, I need to hear it directly from you will YOU do anything you can to STOP Biden and the Far-Lefts hostile takeover of Texas?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mgdXXAeZjKL7sXssek4F7-Fwf5nInQAJnNXvS_bcAGSf12sDMtz--uqvA-jOm0wU9ySdEFF15cbamlyM7hRvBEi0mYRD5NaKr7axh47Shet3ad4-kwGIX2Wo8ChhWBScegNZ2wwg75jtz2-X36d-ELy0l-XT6a-SmKWX_31aS4K-NSaTrleAzT1yb_3B4dQPFPNTfNS-TxuYYBuN9Gi37uopJ3EMG5dlkK4qXhsHf-DqCvoGaHw2MckmTLF4CD5jVBi3oQEz8IyosxQHiawDg3X_GPkuVPWc9hWJf0j5IeX0uqZKNBLaPYbVmsxAv0Bb8FP9HsbYgJ0CwgbZ06FX-d2ccvdSk7hPjvOhFc8Vkk8=&c=zAuStKX5YcQ7ucufJoKTRp-H6ArffgLTWYlvkzr5TUQJCGul-Ru0rQ==&ch=tN9fMHHh5PjUOd3GY0foSLG-JwkajHwf04WmpVfriHsYce1oEVoZpw==)** [ **YES I WILL** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mgdXXAeZjKL7sXssek4F7-Fwf5nInQAJnNXvS_bcAGSf12sDMtz--uqvA-jOm0wU9ySdEFF15cbamlyM7hRvBEi0mYRD5NaKr7axh47Shet3ad4-kwGIX2Wo8ChhWBScegNZ2wwg75jtz2-X36d-ELy0l-XT6a-SmKWX_31aS4K-NSaTrleAzT1yb_3B4dQPFPNTfNS-TxuYYBuN9Gi37uopJ3EMG5dlkK4qXhsHf-DqCvoGaHw2MckmTLF4CD5jVBi3oQEz8IyosxQHiawDg3X_GPkuVPWc9hWJf0j5IeX0uqZKNBLaPYbVmsxAv0Bb8FP9HsbYgJ0CwgbZ06FX-d2ccvdSk7hPWHODYYesXCk=&c=zAuStKX5YcQ7ucufJoKTRp-H6ArffgLTWYlvkzr5TUQJCGul-Ru0rQ==&ch=tN9fMHHh5PjUOd3GY0foSLG-JwkajHwf04WmpVfriHsYce1oEVoZpw==) [ **KEEP TEXAS RED** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mgdXXAeZjKL7sXssek4F7-Fwf5nInQAJnNXvS_bcAGSf12sDMtz--uqvA-jOm0wU9ySdEFF15cbamlyM7hRvBEi0mYRD5NaKr7axh47Shet3ad4-kwGIX2Wo8ChhWBScegNZ2wwg75jtz2-X36d-ELy0l-XT6a-SmKWX_31aS4K-NSaTrleAzT1yb_3B4dQPFPNTfNS-TxuYYBuN9Gi37uopJ3EMG5dlkK4qXhsHf-DqCvoGaHw2MckmTLF4CD5jVBi3oQEz8IyosxQHiawDg3X_GPkuVPWc9hWJf0j5IeX0uqZKNBLaPYbVmsxAv0Bb8FP9HsbYgJ0CwgbZ06FX-d2ccvdSk7hPTiXAk-2FnlE=&c=zAuStKX5YcQ7ucufJoKTRp-H6ArffgLTWYlvkzr5TUQJCGul-Ru0rQ==&ch=tN9fMHHh5PjUOd3GY0foSLG-JwkajHwf04WmpVfriHsYce1oEVoZpw==) I need to know whether you're up for the fight, friend.
The eyes of the nation are about to be turned on Texas.
Liberal activists and coastal elites are painting a big X on our state, ready to take it away from conservatives.
**[Will you stand in their way?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mgdXXAeZjKL7sXssek4F7-Fwf5nInQAJnNXvS_bcAGSf12sDMtz--uqvA-jOm0wU9ySdEFF15cbamlyM7hRvBEi0mYRD5NaKr7axh47Shet3ad4-kwGIX2Wo8ChhWBScegNZ2wwg75jtz2-X36d-ELy0l-XT6a-SmKWX_31aS4K-NSaTrleAzT1yb_3B4dQPFPNTfNS-TxuYYBuN9Gi37uopJ3EMG5dlkK4qXhsHf-DqCvoGaHw2MckmTLF4CD5jVBi3oQEz8IyosxQHiawDg3X_GPkuVPWc9hWJf0j5IeX0uqZKNBLaPYbVmsxAv0Bb8FP9HsbYgJ0CwgbZ06FX-d2ccvdSk7hPD5RxteCvTMo=&c=zAuStKX5YcQ7ucufJoKTRp-H6ArffgLTWYlvkzr5TUQJCGul-Ru0rQ==&ch=tN9fMHHh5PjUOd3GY0foSLG-JwkajHwf04WmpVfriHsYce1oEVoZpw==)**
John Cornyn \-------Forwarded Message Below------- Friend, I'm sure you saw, but recently, Joe Biden became the Democrats presumptive nominee for president of the United States.
While some breathe a sigh of relief now that socialism-pedaling Bernie Sanders is out of the race, I want to send you a special note of caution.
Joe Biden has a history of painting a target on Texas. Look what he said during a rally in Dallas last year: **"I think you're going to turn Texas Blue."**
-Joe Biden September 14, 2019 in Dallas, Texas Now that Biden is uncontested in the race for the presidency, leftist groups around the nation will pour money into his campaign.
We're talking millions upon millions of dollars.
And you know what a large chunk of that change will go towards? You guessed it: flipping Texas blue.
**[I need you to join me immediately in defending our state and our conservative values from the hyper-liberal left, who is itching to take over the Lone Star State. Will you chip in anything you can?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mgdXXAeZjKL7sXssek4F7-Fwf5nInQAJnNXvS_bcAGSf12sDMtz--uqvA-jOm0wU9ySdEFF15cbamlyM7hRvBEi0mYRD5NaKr7axh47Shet3ad4-kwGIX2Wo8ChhWBScegNZ2wwg75jtz2-X36d-ELy0l-XT6a-SmKWX_31aS4K-NSaTrleAzT1yb_3B4dQPFPNTfNS-TxuYYBuN9Gi37uopJ3EMG5dlkK4qXhsHf-DqCvoGaHw2MckmTLF4CD5jVBi3oQEz8IyosxQHiawDg3X_GPkuVPWc9hWJf0j5IeX0uqZKNBLaPYbVmsxAv0Bb8FP9HsbYgJ0CwgbZ06FX-d2ccvdSk7hP92sERZp_szw=&c=zAuStKX5YcQ7ucufJoKTRp-H6ArffgLTWYlvkzr5TUQJCGul-Ru0rQ==&ch=tN9fMHHh5PjUOd3GY0foSLG-JwkajHwf04WmpVfriHsYce1oEVoZpw==)** [ **KEEP TEXAS RED** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mgdXXAeZjKL7sXssek4F7-Fwf5nInQAJnNXvS_bcAGSf12sDMtz--uqvA-jOm0wU9ySdEFF15cbamlyM7hRvBEi0mYRD5NaKr7axh47Shet3ad4-kwGIX2Wo8ChhWBScegNZ2wwg75jtz2-X36d-ELy0l-XT6a-SmKWX_31aS4K-NSaTrleAzT1yb_3B4dQPFPNTfNS-TxuYYBuN9Gi37uopJ3EMG5dlkK4qXhsHf-DqCvoGaHw2MckmTLF4CD5jVBi3oQEz8IyosxQHiawDg3X_GPkuVPWc9hWJf0j5IeX0uqZKNBLaPYbVmsxAv0Bb8FP9HsbYgJ0CwgbZ06FX-d2ccvdSk7hPNYcVbmlinSI=&c=zAuStKX5YcQ7ucufJoKTRp-H6ArffgLTWYlvkzr5TUQJCGul-Ru0rQ==&ch=tN9fMHHh5PjUOd3GY0foSLG-JwkajHwf04WmpVfriHsYce1oEVoZpw==) [ **CHIP IN $25** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mgdXXAeZjKL7sXssek4F7-Fwf5nInQAJnNXvS_bcAGSf12sDMtz--kWo4Wi3K9WVDPKXK2jr2an74QOjUQond6_rlf0dDnsft6s0Qt9dmU_aSqXPhn3tte2eRIJl2DwHc-KhSmq5_HnEZ-Y5FU4kItoMoC0u_zNfFhdkvnvSfdj8GaMYQcCWPfNM0eQ80oViadZL-4RVCjE0YuRZfzvqm2GDs6_9VSyyvxupNgBG_bmqRDPsJa-Cybhg3Lvu7Kuml_opn70YczBktJKMzz6Rm7xSKwKOOoaC0YUgDXg1NWddwhT-cnXwl02rz51ya7yYFBo_cPNBSL8guUWtk0iVi1HQWkhzcPvsUJGamGxOg9ckpJ88CNX4jcDQxI7Y0iyl&c=zAuStKX5YcQ7ucufJoKTRp-H6ArffgLTWYlvkzr5TUQJCGul-Ru0rQ==&ch=tN9fMHHh5PjUOd3GY0foSLG-JwkajHwf04WmpVfriHsYce1oEVoZpw==) Friend, the Left sees Texas as a winnable state in this election they see it as their pot of gold.
They want to use TEXAS to beat President Trump and take me down with him.
I need YOU to step up and show the President and I how serious you are about keeping Texas Red.
**[Will you chip in anything you can now?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mgdXXAeZjKL7sXssek4F7-Fwf5nInQAJnNXvS_bcAGSf12sDMtz--uqvA-jOm0wU9ySdEFF15cbamlyM7hRvBEi0mYRD5NaKr7axh47Shet3ad4-kwGIX2Wo8ChhWBScegNZ2wwg75jtz2-X36d-ELy0l-XT6a-SmKWX_31aS4K-NSaTrleAzT1yb_3B4dQPFPNTfNS-TxuYYBuN9Gi37uopJ3EMG5dlkK4qXhsHf-DqCvoGaHw2MckmTLF4CD5jVBi3oQEz8IyosxQHiawDg3X_GPkuVPWc9hWJf0j5IeX0uqZKNBLaPYbVmsxAv0Bb8FP9HsbYgJ0CwgbZ06FX-d2ccvdSk7hPADn2Hn6aJr8=&c=zAuStKX5YcQ7ucufJoKTRp-H6ArffgLTWYlvkzr5TUQJCGul-Ru0rQ==&ch=tN9fMHHh5PjUOd3GY0foSLG-JwkajHwf04WmpVfriHsYce1oEVoZpw==)**
-John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mgdXXAeZjKL7sXssek4F7-Fwf5nInQAJnNXvS_bcAGSf12sDMtz--kM1dqJ1a-muz2d-EiRyeuUgG0323dM6eEKwjBaeJr9vpANCryunlgWiI37HGTTMPqEAzIIlfxJ3aOJk9sO-u5Pst6PP5KFnjXVAJSsFVEID_omZVcmmOlw=&c=zAuStKX5YcQ7ucufJoKTRp-H6ArffgLTWYlvkzr5TUQJCGul-Ru0rQ==&ch=tN9fMHHh5PjUOd3GY0foSLG-JwkajHwf04WmpVfriHsYce1oEVoZpw==) and [Twitter-](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mgdXXAeZjKL7sXssek4F7-Fwf5nInQAJnNXvS_bcAGSf12sDMtz--uqvA-jOm0wUA2HWv679qjpMnFzEf2P3270C9y4GLNtK_dfV-VTzz2SHGdMrNoAHKlWfR3lGlasNAyVVkbI00sHM8R9YXoQ3eQqcMfZHzeGi&c=zAuStKX5YcQ7ucufJoKTRp-H6ArffgLTWYlvkzr5TUQJCGul-Ru0rQ==&ch=tN9fMHHh5PjUOd3GY0foSLG-JwkajHwf04WmpVfriHsYce1oEVoZpw==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mgdXXAeZjKL7sXssek4F7-Fwf5nInQAJnNXvS_bcAGSf12sDMtz--kM1dqJ1a-muIiZBc7Oy68UkrjMszdB4MPR9fi0JHx1UozyEu4srJhtmlWFZ2pnVrKKkdxEQwDMI0HzvKU40cwYdTftw3mrIwa6CbACCBJUqWvwEuOVGe9DQUYULoRD12Q==&c=zAuStKX5YcQ7ucufJoKTRp-H6ArffgLTWYlvkzr5TUQJCGul-Ru0rQ==&ch=tN9fMHHh5PjUOd3GY0foSLG-JwkajHwf04WmpVfriHsYce1oEVoZpw==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mgdXXAeZjKL7sXssek4F7-Fwf5nInQAJnNXvS_bcAGSf12sDMtz--j9ETRofC1J6tjMOqfPPEYsAjTAQCUupLoUOW4V89LMlDggPt8nUQSQ7awVJxi66Xs_yGxtDDE_sha-YOm5nCG_ZYv4tfhIsFF6lRqiGlutiDNdh8wPgLzksN8iVwBkA3t09a1C61gSL4ZuE0cVTInMxKjLYXGg19xKzlbGFGN_qjieocidFdnKfQQlsrULNSR4hG9WqT147-_HRLRxKX8FHydxQ-vncR0693ThZF_K5WjdWvdU0h4OGs1ijksOGMA==&c=zAuStKX5YcQ7ucufJoKTRp-H6ArffgLTWYlvkzr5TUQJCGul-Ru0rQ==&ch=tN9fMHHh5PjUOd3GY0foSLG-JwkajHwf04WmpVfriHsYce1oEVoZpw==) and find out exactly how you can help. "I think you're going to turn Texas Blue." -Joe Biden September 14, 2019 in Dallas, Texas With Joe Biden recently becoming the presumptive Dem nominee, money will be POURING into his coffers. He'll direct MILLIONS of those funds right into the Lone Star State. == == == I need to know whether you're up for the fight, friend. The eyes of the nation are about to be turned on Texas. While some breathe a sigh of relief now that socialism-pedaling Bernie Sanders is out of the race, I want to send you a special note of caution. Joe Biden has a history of painting a target on Texas. Look what he said during a rally in Dallas last year: "I think you're going to turn Texas Blue." -Joe Biden September 14, 2019 in Dallas, Texas Now that Biden is uncontested in the race for the presidency, leftist groups around the nation will pour money into his campaign. We're talking millions upon millions of dollars. And you know what a large chunk of that change will go towards? You guessed it: flipping Texas blue. == == == Friend, the Left sees Texas as a winnable state in this election they see it as their pot of gold. They want to use TEXAS to beat President Trump and take me down with him. I need YOU to step up and show the President and I how serious you are about keeping Texas Red. == -John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of.
