name: =?utf-8?Q?=E2=9E=A4Signature_Missing_--_Please_Respond_=28Important_Petition_from_VPP=29?=
subject: re: Andrew Cuomo's coronavirus leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | | [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04fb/72412298/4e1b2443/6104e8d7/4091861587/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2")
---
**[Add your name to THANK Andrew Cuomo for his BRAVE leadership combating the coronavirus->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04fb/72412298/4e1b2443/6104e8d6/4091861587/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200411_GovCuomo_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+to+THANK+Andrew+Cuomo+for+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2")**
* * *
Every day the President and governors across the country are giving daily briefings on the coronavirus -- but there's one daily press conference that we ALWAYS are eager to watch.
**Governor Andrew Cuomo of New York has been showing New Yorkers -- and Americans -- what it 's like to be a leader during a pandemic.**
**_Just take it from George Bush 's former communications director:_**
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04fb/72412298/4e1b2443/6104e8d9/4091861587/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2")
---
We are SO PROUD of Gov. Cuomo's leadership -- especially when Donald Trump continues to lie to the American people and spend more time talking about his TV ratings than saving American lives.
**In these uncertain times, it 's important to create some optimistic energy. That's why we're trying to get 10,000 supporters from our digital network to THANK Gov. Cuomo for his leadership.**
_**Will you be one of our 10,000 signatures??**_
| | [Add your name to Thank Gov. Cuomo ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04fb/72412298/4e1b2443/6104e8d8/4091861587/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+to+Thank+Gov+Cuomo+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2")
---
Thanks, and stay safe,
_\-- the Voter Protection Project _

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04fb/72412298/4e1b2443/6104e8db/4091861587/VEsD/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2")
---
| | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---
If you'd like to support the Voter Protection Project, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04fb/72412298/4e1b2443/6104e8da/4091861587/VEsA/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04fb/72412298/4e1b2443/6104e8dd/4091861587/VEsB/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04fb/72412298/4e1b2443/6104e8dc/4091861587/VEsO/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200415_GovCuomo_U1_X2")

\-- Begin Forwarded Message --
From: Jason Lewis <info@jasonlewismn.com>
Date: Wednesday, March 14th, 2020
Subject: I know you're busy, but can you do this before Midnight tomorrow? We have a big goal to meet and I need your help.

Friend -

I know you're busy, so I won't take up too much of your time.

Our April fundraising deadline is quickly coming up at the end of the month and my team also set a mid-month deadline to make sure we can hit our goals.

We're coming up a bit short of our mid-month goal and need 192 more patriots to chip in $25 in order to hit it. [Will you chip in by 11:59 tonight](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aLx4OP4BJnzvIdrcImH3cJW-kCXZsujByW6DJLSDSIC47SjXaW1ldzDhdOmjzYENRUSSqjzfHYgoQ5OG80rsRpSPIY49cF_3kckL6Lmh1-U4ANJ1LbF8dcXT3q2u4EGmhJ1ICH6KLYJ1z1R7YGlgO6MsO9HMI9zIZFeMaI1HLTVqvTvYsWcw-2c9YGuGTjs5LKzfcwL5BUw=&c=yY4JthAlqj3f5lRrJ1A_k3_GwkTTtsuOzNFdHjwqBgCnaCksfeFDDQ==&ch=UOhLrBmW_s0qSXLrjWTyAJuG1nCyDO65gheSjq6GS-vXVKXsjcN5iw==)[?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aLx4OP4BJnzvIdrcImH3cJW-kCXZsujByW6DJLSDSIC47SjXaW1ldzDhdOmjzYENRUSSqjzfHYgoQ5OG80rsRpSPIY49cF_3kckL6Lmh1-U4ANJ1LbF8dcXT3q2u4EGmhJ1ICH6KLYJ1z1R7YGlgO6MsO9HMI9zIZFeMaI1HLTVqvTvYsWcw-2c9YGuGTjs5LKzfcwL5BUw=&c=yY4JthAlqj3f5lRrJ1A_k3_GwkTTtsuOzNFdHjwqBgCnaCksfeFDDQ==&ch=UOhLrBmW_s0qSXLrjWTyAJuG1nCyDO65gheSjq6GS-vXVKXsjcN5iw==) 3X match is ACTIVE:

[**Donate $25**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aLx4OP4BJnzvIdrcImH3cJW-kCXZsujByW6DJLSDSIC47SjXaW1ld62WsfGVwOsssOFhN0PRkg6zDewmtVITTcEXd4QqJ1VfiNytu2ZN1H6akN3GqYOPcJkwCcR9tAxzpDUhJKyvcoTwmV_AGFMaiWEo6wJ-irf06vdK3-UCxNy_IJCMcKISqmkGDHv16OlgqY6fmnEeYFGw5QEPdLaNKQ==&c=yY4JthAlqj3f5lRrJ1A_k3_GwkTTtsuOzNFdHjwqBgCnaCksfeFDDQ==&ch=UOhLrBmW_s0qSXLrjWTyAJuG1nCyDO65gheSjq6GS-vXVKXsjcN5iw==)

**Chuck Schumer is up to no good. **

His dark money Super PAC has raised over $57 MILLION and counting to defeat Republicans.

**This could all come down to Minnesota, Friend.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sam=20Loveridge=20=28Campaign=20Manager=29?=
subject: Help Us Meet Our Goal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
|

| |
---
| |
# I Need Your Help Today!
As you know, running a campaign during the Covid-19 outbreak is a very difficult task. Normally, I would be spending my days attending Lincoln-Reagan Day dinners, knocking on doors, and planning meet and greets and fundraisers for Troy.

**But, just because we're living in unprecedented times doesn't mean we don't have an election to win. Tonight at Midnight is our fundraising deadline and we are so close to reaching our goal.
Will you Donate Today?**

Troy has gone to work producing hand sanitizer for our communities and first responders. Just yesterday, Troy travelled to Fromberg, Billings, and Crow Agency to deliver hand sanitizer.

On the campaign front, we've gone digital. Getting aggressive sharing Troy's message of transparency, open markets, and his vast experience in both the Insurance and Securities industries on social media.

As we near the time where budgets need to be finalized and voter contact plans approved we need your help now more than ever.
I know times are hard, but we have to keep funding this campaign.

**If you can, please donate before midnight today. **

Best,
Sam Loveridge
Campaign Manager

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Pulls WHO Funding, Says Organization ‘Must Be Held Accountable’
body:
"Our countries are now experiencing—look all over the world—tremendous death and economic devastation because those tasked with protecting us..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4e725dd33e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Pulls WHO Funding, Says Organization ‘Must Be Held Accountable’**

“President Donald Trump made it official [yesterday] that the administration was halting money to the World Health Organization, the international body that said in January that COVID-19 could not be spread by human-to-human contact, and praised China’s response to the virus,” Fred Lucas reports in _The Daily Signal_.

“Our countries are now experiencing—look all over the world—tremendous death and economic devastation because those tasked with protecting us by being truthful and transparent failed to do so,” the President said.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c3e21a88f6&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:** [“China broke the World Health Organization. The U.S. has to fix it or leave.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ada2dcf78&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| CNN anchor John King admits that the WHO dropped the ball in its early response to Coronavirus, echoing criticisms from President Trump. “I’m not going to defend the WHO,” he said, noting that their response “was flat footed. It did overly trust China, the president is right about that.” Read more from Peter Hasson in [_The Daily Caller_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3745b6f8a3&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| President Trump scored a major diplomatic victory this weekend “when he brokered a deal between the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries (OPEC) and Russia to limit their production . . . Credit to Mr. Trump for using U.S. global influence to mitigate the mayhem,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=50c6c8b74c&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “Tim Miller was to the point where he was going to have to make some really tough choices. That’s when an unexpected lifeline”—President Trump’s Paycheck Protection Program—“helped the Owasso resident save the business he has worked tirelessly to build up over the past eight years,” Shawn Hein writes for the [Owasso Reporter](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=097007c404&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump on Tuesday announced a new public-private partnership aimed at allowing hospitals to lend unused ventilators to areas that need them to treat patients who have contracted the novel coronavirus,” Morgan Chalfant reports in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f0c132efc8&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=abb63b9b1d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f132408e0c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=cc80ab93b1)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: FWD: We still need you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Want to help? Here’s how. Tap or click >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/we-still-need-you-469169?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | Indiana Republican,

A lot of things have changed recently due to the Coronavirus pandemic, but one thing remains the same — our critical need to get out the vote to support President Trump, Governor Holcomb and Republicans up and down the ballot.

Did you see Kyle’s email earlier? We recently launched a new program that enables Hoosier Republicans like you to make phone calls to your fellow Republicans from home!

In fact, we have a great opportunity**this Saturday with our next Super Saturday**. Hoosier Republicans across the state will be making calls from home – and we invite you to join in!

It is crucial that we keep Hoosiers informed about the changes happening in this election cycle. Indiana’s primary has been moved from May 5 to June 2, and _all voters now have the option to vote by mail in the primary._

[Will you volunteer to work the phones from home to help get out the vote?](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=34fbfec3fe&e=1acd9bb3d6)

It’s more important than ever to work together to make sure we’re supporting great Republicans leaders – and this is an excellent way to make sure your voice is heard (while helping your fellow Hoosiers)!

#INThisTogether,

-Indiana Republican Party
---
| [Join our "Phone from Home" Program!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fdd7a25982&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Join our "Phone from Home" Program!")
---
id:2020-04-07-15:35:09:948t
---
|
---
| To: Indiana Repbulicans
From: Kyle Hupfer
Subject: We still need you
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f872352594&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | Hoosier Republican,

I hope you and your loved ones are staying healthy while hunkering down at home and social distancing.

This coronavirus pandemic has affected so much of our daily lives, including how we campaign. Elections are moving forward — even if they have been delayed. Our primary was just moved from May 5 to June 2, and we still have a lot of work to do.

We need your help as we move our get-out-the-vote efforts online and on to the phones!

As things continue to change, voters need to know how and when they can vote. Did you know that all Indiana voters are now able to vote by mail in the primary?

We recently launched a new program that allows Indiana Republican Party volunteers to make calls to their fellow Hoosier voters from their homes.

**[Will you join us by making calls from your home?](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ca76afb1bb&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

It is imperative that we support President Trump, Governor Holcomb, and all Republicans candidates in 2020.

Thanks for your help!

\- Kyle Hupfer

Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

---
| [Join Our "Phone from Home" Program!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=215edc54ff&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Join Our "Phone from Home" Program!")
---

clean_body: | "" | | We 'll get straight to the point, team: We need to get another 11 donations from Cresco by tomorrow -- "" There's been a lot of developments in our campaign in recent weeks: FIRST: Francis has been receiving TONS of support, including the coveted endorsement of VoteVets, an organization dedicated to supporting Democratic veterans in key races across the country. BUT THEN: The Congressional Leadership Fund announced a $600,000 in TV Ads to try and BUY this election! SO NOW: We're fighting back in a unique way to show that we have the grassroots enthusiasm it'll take to win. We need a SURGE of 100 donations before our mid-month deadline hits tomorrow. We know we can do it, but we need you to be one of the 11 donations from Cresco. Remember, it 's not about how much money we raise -- so even $3 helps us get closer to reaching our goal: | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Thanks, Team Conole | | "" | "" | If you'd like to support Conole for Congress, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Margaret Good
subject: The federal government isn't pulling its weight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17152045/184428271/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODA5ZTg4NC00ZjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M81d1FihXT_uJQpzvYwIg84RINdEomciFjAVUjtgZ4o=&emci=30e121dd-457f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=3809e884-4f7f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644) Today was supposed to be tax day, but due to the ongoing coronavirus crisis, the filing deadline has been postponed until July 15th. Amidst this crisis, working Americans were promised that the government would look out for them, and help them make it to the other side of this pandemic without losing their homes, their savings, or their lives. So far, we haven’t seen that happen. Bailouts for major airlines and other big corporations are being actively considered, even while working people are waiting weeks and weeks for the unemployment benefits they deserve — we simply aren’t getting the help we need from the federal government. The Trump administration's stance is clear: If you're a millionaire or own multimillion dollar businesses — like Vern—you should expect your pocketbook to get bigger while the rest of us suffer. It’s time we have a representative that actually fights for working people, and cares about our district. Someone who will help small businesses and families struggling to feed their kids to get the relief they desperately need. All of this to say, I know you’re struggling, and I’m working as hard as I can here to get relief for everyone who needs it. But the federal government must do its part, too, and I’m working hard to hold them accountable to the American people. In the meantime, if you have any questions about taxes or coronavirus relief, visit our website: [www.swfloridacovid.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17152046/184428272/-198399239?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODA5ZTg4NC00ZjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M81d1FihXT_uJQpzvYwIg84RINdEomciFjAVUjtgZ4o=&emci=30e121dd-457f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=3809e884-4f7f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644). Wishing you health and safety, —Margaret | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17152047/184428273/-756790116?refcode=E2248-20200415-TaxDay-footer&amount=20.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODA5ZTg4NC00ZjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M81d1FihXT_uJQpzvYwIg84RINdEomciFjAVUjtgZ4o=)
---

name: Dean Browning
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
While the COVID-19 pandemic has turned our world upside down, I am still committed to one thing... Defeating Rep. Susan Wild in November 2020. Will you show your support today in defeating Susan Wild by contributing $50, $25, or even just $10 to my campaign?
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016K9YJpSfVuw-VkGXjSxUMUC7QQ-cCS8HR07MqvQXDpFN-QlzO-CzBgcAePcX-MfKkmc3hM0pqf4o0IhVDsnZ39hSHc78kmvdJz5K8ws7D-BfOwZ8vbBooq_DJE2V940HxPorKOPZwgUfjrgsSujPiPBPgTiT-8Bj8WFjAGTDwDHOczZCaFgc1A==&c=4czriXXUy3cDPDfudrltYR2RL8vE398ztVF76quWfbN9jo2rndglVg==&ch=H84eb2nSg1FQVaM4qXgf6QQirLbcnSAWVbR2I9oBfRJVMlUjePMWGw==)
---
| Many things have changed, including my approach in running this campaign. Above all else, I am putting the safety and health of everyone in the district as my top priority.
This means I cannot be as active in the community as I would like and still ensure we are safely using social distancing and limiting travel. As a result, we have taken a stronger approach to our digital campaign to spread our message while following stay-at-home guidelines.
But the one thing that has not changed is the need to continue funding this campaign. Grassroots donors like yourself has been the backbone of the campaign and I appreciate your continued support!.
We cannot slow down!!
Would you please help me continue to fight for the people of Lehigh Valley?
A donation of $50, $25, or even just $10 will go a long way in helping me and my campaign!
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016K9YJpSfVuw-VkGXjSxUMUC7QQ-cCS8HR07MqvQXDpFN-QlzO-CzBgcAePcX-MfKkmc3hM0pqf4o0IhVDsnZ39hSHc78kmvdJz5K8ws7D-BfOwZ8vbBooq_DJE2V940HxPorKOPZwgUfjrgsSujPiPBPgTiT-8Bj8WFjAGTDwDHOczZCaFgc1A==&c=4czriXXUy3cDPDfudrltYR2RL8vE398ztVF76quWfbN9jo2rndglVg==&ch=H84eb2nSg1FQVaM4qXgf6QQirLbcnSAWVbR2I9oBfRJVMlUjePMWGw==)
---
| , hope you and your family are staying safe and staying healthy during these difficult times. I look forward to the day this is all over and we can go back to our normal lives.
Until then, stay strong and remember... WE NEED TO DEFEAT REP. SUSAN WILD IN 2020!!
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016K9YJpSfVuw-VkGXjSxUMUC7QQ-cCS8HR07MqvQXDpFN-QlzO-CzBgcAePcX-MfKkmc3hM0pqf4o0IhVDsnZ39hSHc78kmvdJz5K8ws7D-BfOwZ8vbBooq_DJE2V940HxPorKOPZwgUfjrgsSujPiPBPgTiT-8Bj8WFjAGTDwDHOczZCaFgc1A==&c=4czriXXUy3cDPDfudrltYR2RL8vE398ztVF76quWfbN9jo2rndglVg==&ch=H84eb2nSg1FQVaM4qXgf6QQirLbcnSAWVbR2I9oBfRJVMlUjePMWGw==)

name: Zachary Meunier
subject: re: Iowa’s Second District
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uPigKiMuTbGgxOPxD2n-6t01LuP7gVvgGbpKH218WTw=/ZFZRVwS2kMiXadksuQrDs5ygbwO_sHKw5GUk4oXKiog=?refcode=200415-email) We're halfway through April, but Iowa's Second District is still considered a complete TOSS-UP. We need all the resources we can get to win in a district as competitive as ours -- Donald Trump won here in 2016. A national GOP Super PAC is spending almost $4 million in Iowa trying to stop real, positive change. It won't be easy, but we can do it if we all work together. **[That's why we need as many people as we can to donate $20 before tomorrow so we can keep up with this flood of outside money trying to keep us down. name: EdMarkey.com
subject: reaching out to ask you to help us fund our effort to get Ed on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
We need some help covering this unexpected cost, so I'm hoping you can help.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de89/693b8b0a/42e24db8/72de584e/1560403054/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

_At a time when so many are facing hardship and uncertainty, we understand if you cannot afford to donate right now. We are just grateful to be in this fight with you. Senator Markey and all of us on Team Markey are here for you -- fighting for you. We will get through this together._

* * *

Friends -
I'm reaching out to ask you to make a donation to help us fund our effort to get Ed on the ballot.
You see, to get on the ballot, we have to collect signatures from thousands and thousands of registered voters. And since we can't collect these signatures in person anymore, we had to come up with a new plan.
We've quickly organized a system to mail the official paperwork, instructions, and a return envelope to thousands of supporters who have stepped up and said they'll add their name to help get Ed on the ballot.
But we need some help covering this unexpected cost, so I'm hoping you can help.
**[Can you make a donation to our campaign to help us fund our new effort to get Ed on the ballot? Whatever you can afford to give would go a long way for our campaign.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de89/693b8b0a/42e24db8/72de584d/1560403054/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDA0MTUtdDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-april?refcode=em200415-t2")**
A month ago, our plan to get these signatures was working perfectly.
We were organizing in every corner of the state at the local, grassroots caucuses. But now, the remainder of those caucuses have been rightfully canceled due to the coronavirus pandemic.
The good news is that our opponent and the state party acknowledged that our lead was insurmountable and that we would have easily won. That's a huge testament to the grassroots movement we've built across the state.
The problem for us is that all of those signatures we counted on collecting aren't possible anymore, along with all of the rest of the in-person events we had planned.
We quickly adjusted and our new plan is already well underway, but these costs weren't in our budget. So I need to ask you to help us fund this effort:
**[Please make a donation to our campaign today. Your support will help us get Ed on the ballot and put us one step closer to winning this race.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de89/693b8b0a/42e24db8/72de584d/1560403054/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDA0MTUtdDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-april?refcode=em200415-t2")**
Thank you for staying in this fight with Ed. It means a lot to know we can count on this grassroots movement to stick with us.
All my best,
John Walsh
Campaign Manager
**[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de89/693b8b0a/42e24db8/72de584d/1560403054/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDA0MTUtdDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-april?refcode=em200415-t2")**

* * *
Paid for by The Markey Committee
---
The Markey Committee
PO Box 120029
Boston, MA 02112 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de89/693b8b0a/42e24db8/72de584c/1560403054/VEsD/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://ma.edmarkey.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Senator Ed Markey with a contribution, [click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de89/693b8b0a/42e24db8/72de5843/1560403054/VEsA/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_footer").

name: Greg Stanton
subject: We cannot let what happened in Wisconsin happen again in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wZObxVLDGmMGKvGbLWVwj7JfufcjgTuXFAtwa4RQDPA=/76xMgrOOPWN0pvlZzABkRfsdNUrGnx-JqXf9lVe2SBo=)

**Last week, voters in Wisconsin had to put their health and safety at risk by braving hours-long, crowded polling place lines simply to cast their ballot during this COVID-19 pandemic. **

That disastrous situation was completely avoidable had a universal vote by mail option been instituted in Wisconsin for every voter to be able to participate in the democratic process from the safety of their own home.

**We cannot let the fiasco that took place in Wisconsin happen again in November, which is why we need to take action now to demand the implementation of a universal vote by mail option nationwide.**

As has been the case for years here in Arizona, voting by mail is _safe, secure, and simple._

[**SIGN ON to DEMAND a universal vote by mail option for every voter »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wZObxVLDGmMGKvGbLWVwj7JfufcjgTuXFAtwa4RQDPA=/76xMgrOOPWN0pvlZzABkRfsdNUrGnx-JqXf9lVe2SBo=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wZObxVLDGmMGKvGbLWVwj7JfufcjgTuXFAtwa4RQDPA=/76xMgrOOPWN0pvlZzABkRfsdNUrGnx-JqXf9lVe2SBo=)

Look, the 2020 election could be one of the most pivotal in our country's entire history, so we need to do everything possible to make sure that every voter is able to safely and securely cast their ballot.

**The integrity of our election is at stake -- we need a universal vote by mail option across the country like we have in Arizona!**

[**Support a universal vote by mail option across the country | SIGN ON »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wZObxVLDGmMGKvGbLWVwj7JfufcjgTuXFAtwa4RQDPA=/76xMgrOOPWN0pvlZzABkRfsdNUrGnx-JqXf9lVe2SBo=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wZObxVLDGmMGKvGbLWVwj7JfufcjgTuXFAtwa4RQDPA=/76xMgrOOPWN0pvlZzABkRfsdNUrGnx-JqXf9lVe2SBo=)

Thank you for taking action to slow the spread of COVID-19 in our communities and to secure our 2020 elections,

\-- _ Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---

4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: Help us send postcards to over 10,000 voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
We're launching an extensive postcard campaign to reach voters, and we need your help | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/83678d442655/help-us-send-postcards-to-over-10000-voters?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
We are working hard to defeat Adam Kinzinger and flip Illinois' 16th district blue this November.

In order to do that, we need to make sure we reach as many voters as possible over the next 202 days. **Due to the COVID-19 pandemic, our hundreds of volunteers can't get out and knock doors for us.

But, they can send postcards.**

We are launching an effort with our volunteers to reach 10,000 voters with postcards over the next 2 months, and we need your help to make that happen.[ Can you chip in $5.50 to help us pay for 10 stamps to send postcards to 10 voters?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=28e73b92ce&e=140a9b81e7)

Our efforts to win this race and strengthen our Democratic majority in the House have never been more urgent, and to do that we need to make sure we reach every voter with our message. **With your help, we'll be able to get our message out and increase turnout so we can emerge victorious in November. **

Thank you,

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
---

body:
Today is the deadline Mondaire emailed you about yesterday. By midnight tonight, we will know exactly where we stand compared to our opponents in terms of fundraising. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DAE/ni0YAA/t.30y/fgg5FtrXSQ2Zdbx9RVcrZw/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKWZvxQDjmQb086nFFsAMwVEfQCbJ1zizB-2FC6yaSVeQkRGNQvZZK8U0idhPhpqfvF8KarsfsguFoYHBUDm4CkX0V3nBgkwxfZvrPEfRJgze1rK4ZfPJcOVZXhszb7jOVTGVgl96oII1s0wvNdYUG2EwWd9-2BI-2Bt7rsfL0N85bU25f0nZdFkFxNeiJJr2KOv5PGc6tbgTeL8eLDE4t6tPcPAp399cNtg9Nv-2FFMEfeQ3E7QQ-3D-3D/mrtm) Friend,
Today is the deadline Mondaire emailed you about yesterday. By midnight tonight, we will know exactly where we stand compared to our opponents in terms of fundraising. We will be able to show people that you don’t need to self-fund millions of dollars or accept corporate PAC donations in order to run a serious campaign. But we still have to keep up our fundraising momentum for these last few weeks of the race. We’ve made some progress since yesterday on our mid-month fundraising deadline, **_but we’re still $2,610 from where we need to be_**. We just invested in an automatic dialer that will let us reach 300x as many voters as we can now, but we have to hit our goal to be able to pay for the dialer through the end of the campaign. **_[Will you make a contribution today to help us get there?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DAE/ni0YAA/t.30y/fgg5FtrXSQ2Zdbx9RVcrZw/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKWZvxQDjmQb086nFFsAMwVEfQCbJ1zizB-2FC6yaSVeQkWa3QKcc9aPzA4pGx3pqEHm98HklBqOxESOcRgVHqrBb-2FloWtc5EZdPjL-2B3vD5q-2BLuo7z9sNEd-2Baidb3-2BKWiOZ5-2BWObX2rKQCxQv6PVGjYsyWUQb5Tl8bVQXnYbEnuWjB6WQusF7PSGlKN9wlpm9FFhLuJT0PAAEqT6bsf8uARLIAccdCfhYyWQVXW4wy4T7QA-3D-3D/X9JW)_**

Subj: Two big deadlines tomorrow From: Mondaire Jones Friend, There are two big deadlines coming up tomorrow. The first is the FEC filing deadline, where every candidate will officially file their first quarterly report of 2020 and show how much they’ve raised this year. We’ve already announced that we’ve raised $340,000 this past quarter and over $830,000 over the course of our campaign. We did that without corporate PAC donations and without self-funding, unlike our opponents. **_In fact, 80% of our donations were small-dollar contributions of $200 or less._**
The other big deadline is our April mid-month fundraising deadline. We’ve done a great job fundraising so far, but we are falling behind right now. **_We’re about $4,750 away from where we need to be at this point in the month._** One of our opponents has already spent nearly $400,000 on TV ads and will likely announce tomorrow that he has put hundreds of thousands, if not millions, of dollars more of his own money into his campaign. We don’t have that kind of personal wealth, but we do have supporters like you. **_[Can you make a donation today to help us hit our mid-month goal and get us to where we need to be?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DAE/ni0YAA/t.30y/fgg5FtrXSQ2Zdbx9RVcrZw/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJXz0vuthnEjtT1eBbnubOAo-2BOCcr-2FdKsg6Bjtf-2Bz4CLXUXZOy1nsBj-2F3-2Bz2hMH2lNY-2BPKMMukmO-2ByCbGMI-2Fw-2F1PImN-2FwBVwxjkBuJ4hkC5kcwUEC6oJmcV03f8STxnCSQwiFoKAj7pC3nZx1gtt0PQ9-2FagOnSni8Pu8mO0a6M6almW-2BGZowsATcV0aMlXCzGjVHykonnTdIrCDZqbZdo8IK9Ia4Uou-2BFPAJMG6fNElMQ-3D-3D/jSUs)_**

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: following up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
We're in the process of reviewing our budget between now and November, and we've noticed a couple areas within our strategy that need strengthening.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuPCxYkoh7-MBnOkp4DPXz-10I3gaUWFauq0AvEmJkE=/VKOUqag4wQ9TESEI-Xe12tRN-wCIZUawh4SddnU7JmI=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.15_spk_b1_all&amount=15)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hopes you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you 'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuPCxYkoh7-MBnOkp4DPXz-10I3gaUWFauq0AvEmJkE=/j0QqyFpqvafUMDMyX07aNeg1WH9_pVxMipjERoHjWZk=) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *

Team,

Yesterday my team sent an email explaining our need to expand our campaign's digital outreach, and I wanted to follow up.

I see it as my responsibility to ensure that my team has the resources they need to build a campaign that can win, friend.

We also want to make sure that our supporters and volunteers have all the tools they need to build on our community work from a safe and healthy distance. [**So if you 're able to make a donation at this time, our campaign would greatly appreciate your help in our efforts to expand our digital organizing program.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuPCxYkoh7-MBnOkp4DPXz-10I3gaUWFauq0AvEmJkE=/48ynr4I2IIVrlOOurihuvD9zWwUJNQGphi8rrzuDEMo=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.15_spk_b1_all&amount=15) | [DONATE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuPCxYkoh7-MBnOkp4DPXz-10I3gaUWFauq0AvEmJkE=/VKOUqag4wQ9TESEI-Xe12tRN-wCIZUawh4SddnU7JmI=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.15_spk_b1_all&amount=15)
---

Despite everything that's going on -- I am regularly blown away by the volunteer force we've built here in TX-22.

This team remains focused on keeping our momentum strong so we can bring needed change and true representation to our district. Winning in November means building and expanding our campaign's presence in the community in the safest way we can -- digitally -- right now, when it is most needed.

Here's a link where you can make an immediate donation to help us get these new programs running and in the hands of our volunteers:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuPCxYkoh7-MBnOkp4DPXz-10I3gaUWFauq0AvEmJkE=/48ynr4I2IIVrlOOurihuvD9zWwUJNQGphi8rrzuDEMo=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.15_spk_b1_all&amount=15)

Thank you friends,
Sri

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuPCxYkoh7-MBnOkp4DPXz-10I3gaUWFauq0AvEmJkE=/VKOUqag4wQ9TESEI-Xe12tRN-wCIZUawh4SddnU7JmI=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.15_spk_b1_all&amount=15)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuPCxYkoh7-MBnOkp4DPXz-10I3gaUWFauq0AvEmJkE=/VKOUqag4wQ9TESEI-Xe12tRN-wCIZUawh4SddnU7JmI=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.15_spk_b1_all&amount=15)
---
* * *
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at [sri2020.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuPCxYkoh7-MBnOkp4DPXz-10I3gaUWFauq0AvEmJkE=/e-LCi0Tb2AzsTogon08LzvxUaCrW2ZHeFtHHLgwHWeA=)
| Paid for by Sri for Congress
---
SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898

If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/kuPCxYkoh7-MBnOkp4DPXz-10I3gaUWFauq0AvEmJkE=/hLROQHDRJOzKQkoyGPh9GvKbUKpRKLVo5FUYAvTl3jU=).

You are receiving this email from 314 Action Fund because you've previously expressed interest in our efforts. | Dr. Anthony Fauci is putting his career on the line to save American lives by _telling the truth -- despite Donald Trump's attempts to silence it._

After he said that more lives would have been saved had the federal government responded to the coronavirus crisis sooner, Donald Trump retweeted a far-right troll's call to "#FireFauci."

[It's an outrage that Dr. Fauci -- America's preeminent disease expert -- could lose his job because he's an honest public servant. Add your name to demand that Trump not fire Dr. Fauci:](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c60/4bd7760e/5a06fc4c/77afa2bd/4025535181/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/protect-dr-faucis-job?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Itrsquos+an+outrage+that+Dr+Fauci+mdash+&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200414_6MO6MAT_none_STD_1_protectdrfauci&source=314_EM_PT_200414_6MO6MAT_none_STD_1_protectdrfauci&refcode=314_EM_PT_200414_6MO6MAT_none_STD_1_protectdrfauci")

**\------Begin Forwarded Message------**

**Yesterday morning:** Dr. Anthony S. Fauci said that more lives could have been saved from coronavirus if the country shut down sooner.

**Last night:** President Trump voiced his displeasure with Dr. Fauci's honesty via Twitter. _He retweeted a "Time to #FireFauci" tweet._

Trey Hollingsworth is willing to trade in American lives to boost his investment portfolio. = At the height of the coronavirus outbreak, an Indiana Congressman thinks needlessly sacrificing lives is a trade-off worth making. And while Hollingsworth knows this would result in the death of countless Americans, he has made it abundantly clear he just doesn’t care. = Let’s not mince words, Hollingsworth is an out-of-touch millionaire with more concern for shareholders’ pocketbooks than Hoosiers' lives. But here’s the good news: we can vote him out in November. He represents one of the most competitive congressional districts in the state. And we’re building the infrastructure to make sure you never have another representative that puts money before you and your family. = 100% of your contribution goes toward mobilizing voters, building campaigns, and electing Democrats that care about Hoosiers in November. body:
Let us explain how we got here
#
You may have heard from us by now that we need your help reaching our $30,000 mid-month goal. It's a big goal – and we want to explain. Before we get more into the how and why of it all, though, we want to ask:
**[Can you contribute $4.80 – or whatever you can afford – before our crucial deadline at midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17153704/184465630/939538650?refcode=em20200415-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjA3YWZhYS01ZjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uRToQ_BRXx0xjjtE3eCLf54-5d8feS1F3sBxGgoZuT4=)**
****[Contribute $4.80](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17153705/184465631/939538650?refcode=em20200415-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjA3YWZhYS01ZjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uRToQ_BRXx0xjjtE3eCLf54-5d8feS1F3sBxGgoZuT4=)****
Earlier this month, our campaign's finance team crunched the numbers and reassessed our projections for the campaign through the Kentucky primaries. And without us getting too into the weeds about spreadsheets and formulas – **it's absolutely vital that we start the second half of April with at least $30,000 on hand.**
Some of the $30,000 will go towards funding increased voter outreach. Due to the COVID-19 crisis, the primary has been delayed to June 23, and we want to make sure that every Kentuckian has a clear plan to vote and cast their ballot safely. With the primaries less than 70 days away, we're hoping to increase our voter outreach and education on top of our usual strategy to grow our supporter base.
We also want to make sure that we're in a financial position to continue running our now-100% remote campaign in the best way possible. Even a month later, we're still finding new ways to improve our campaign strategy, but deploying new tactics often come at a cost we were not initially prepared for.
Meeting our $30,000 goal tonight would mean that our campaign would be well prepared to meet the challenges ahead and to continue keeping the lights on, staff paid, and volunteers trained.
Join us and help us keep up the fight; **[chip in whatever you can afford before our deadline tonight. We're just a handful of donations away from hitting our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17153706/184465632/939538650?refcode=em20200415-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjA3YWZhYS01ZjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uRToQ_BRXx0xjjtE3eCLf54-5d8feS1F3sBxGgoZuT4=)**
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17153707/184465633/939538650?refcode=em20200415-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjA3YWZhYS01ZjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uRToQ_BRXx0xjjtE3eCLf54-5d8feS1F3sBxGgoZuT4=)****
— Team Booker

body:
Can Rodney count on you?
Friend,
Radical Democrats haven't let up on their efforts to influence the outcome of this November's key races. In fact, they've recently ramped up the amount of time and energy spent on helping Rodney's radical opponent, Betsy "Leftwing" Londrigan.
One of its new dark money PACs, House Majority Forward, is executing a large TV and digital advertising strategy in Downstate Illinois to prop up Londrigan.
Because of these actions and additional out-of-state money that our opponent's campaign is able to access, our team fears that Londrigan is in a much better position to reach Downstate Illinois voters digitally this spring. clean_body: Can Rodney count on you? Friend, Radical Democrats haven't let up on their efforts to influence the outcome of this November's key races. In fact, they've recently ramped up the amount of time and energy spent on helping Rodney's radical opponent, Betsy "Leftwing" Londrigan. One of its new dark money PACs, House Majority Forward, is executing a large TV and digital advertising strategy in Downstate Illinois to prop up Londrigan. Because of these actions and additional out-of-state money that our opponent's campaign is able to access, our team fears that Londrigan is in a much better position to reach Downstate Illinois voters digitally this spring. == In order to quickly catch back up, it's important that our campaign has the needed resources to push back now to secure a win in November. Friend, we need your help. == == == == == == Thank you, Team Rodney Downstate Illinois is the #1 target for Democrats this year, can we count on you to rush in $15, $10, $5, or even $1, to help Rodney win this race? **== ==** Paid for and authorized by Rodney for Congress == PO BOX 344 Taylorville, IL 62568 This message reflects the opinions and representations of the Rodney for Congress. name: Nate
subject: fwd: Communist lies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
It's time that we send a strong message to President Xi and the Communist Party. The United States refuses to allow their dangerous rhetoric and disregard for the health and safety of human beings around the world to continue any longer.
Friend,

Did you receive our message from the other day about signing your name to stand up to China? (See below).

The Chinese government has systematically silenced doctors and healthcare professionals who spoke out about the COVID-19 virus at the onset while simultaneously spreading disinformation about its origins.

It's time that we send a strong message to President Xi and the Communist Party. The United States refuses to allow their dangerous rhetoric and disregard for the health and safety of human beings around the world to continue any longer. **That 's why Senator Cory Gardner (R-CO) has called for an inter-agency council to investigate and stop China's spread of disinformation about the virus' progression in their country and around the world.**

**_But there is more that we need to do.

Cory has asked top supporters like you to get involved in the fight against China's Communist regime and help him hold them accountable._**
**[**STAND UP TO CHINA - SIGN YOUR NAME**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010CxC_FuiK0_N9HWOF0Pz6fqP_-WXGmkydccW3CpXBxambWX4eOeQhrjIuigALFuqY4FEMkYF_tEF2ZMtyz8Y9HK_JPPLhjoHvNgBepGPFRLXeuHtrHk6W4IAdw-lwR90bh2ZNW6eRQiOqJWYRfXD3aknaWxWfXjWe75QEa4hGiUPp0aDNSHaZKERD2eebhS7AMrFS1ujDMYejPsKxhmU9Oe-2LRUDuRMEKHpac16ZiXDqeOWizc641ZmKq3iG3khFWkqM2MSCZuLq4C8PGaaJxE0B9oPGOGBjirnJ_V4G3ZyAfukl6kqe4-23UmBVpLglVsubbgJekE3l0WvnjesCqJSboxhyEVgdWg5SHVoFF4=&c=7_1nLGSmERGY8USvHOWaMYNJ4mMj1a5jDZK6MsCaIFIiz4QwJPnk9A==&ch=mI20LHEzfPt74k4fG-BzUNJzTPlHTopgJOURGz-3sDl75uxv4T0b5Q==)**
---

Thanks for signing your name to hold China's totalitarian government accountable and take a stand for Americans affected by its negligence and disregard for human life.

Nate
_Team Gardner Volunteer _

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Petition Updates
Date: Mon, Apr 13, 2020 at 7:46 PM
Subject: Communist lies

Friend

The COVID-19 outbreak has had a profound effect on almost all facets of American life. Hospital workers, first responders, and essential personnel are working overtime to adapt as the virus continues to spread throughout the country.

It is critical now that we form a united response to China's malicious actions since the outbreak began and support leaders like Senator Cory Gardner (R-CO), who are working to ensure that American lives are protected while also holding China accountable.

**_If you want to stand up to China 's Communist government and send a message that you reject the far-Left's dismissal of it's responsibility for the spread of COVID-19, then add your name below NOW:

_**
**[**STAND UP TO CHINA - SIGN YOUR NAME**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010CxC_FuiK0_N9HWOF0Pz6fqP_-WXGmkydccW3CpXBxambWX4eOeQhrjIuigALFuqY4FEMkYF_tEF2ZMtyz8Y9HK_JPPLhjoHvNgBepGPFRLXeuHtrHk6W4IAdw-lwR90bh2ZNW6eRQiOqJWYRfXD3aknaWxWfXjWe75QEa4hGiUPp0aDNSHaZKERD2eebhS7AMrFS1ujDMYejPsKxhmU9Oe-2LRUDuRMEKHpac16ZiXDqeOWizc641ZmKq3iG3khFWkqM2MSCZuLq4C8PGaaJxE0B9oPGOGBjirnJ_V4G3ZyAfukl6kqe4-23UmBVpLglVsubbgJekE3l0WvnjesCqJSboxhyEVgdWg5SHVoFF4=&c=7_1nLGSmERGY8USvHOWaMYNJ4mMj1a5jDZK6MsCaIFIiz4QwJPnk9A==&ch=mI20LHEzfPt74k4fG-BzUNJzTPlHTopgJOURGz-3sDl75uxv4T0b5Q==)**
---

As we continue to come together as a nation and fight back against this outbreak, we must take action to reveal the truth about the negligent acts facilitated by China's Communist regime. _**China 's dangerous disinformation campaign aimed at shifting the blame of this pandemic is a disgrace, which is why I firmly believe that we must hold China's government accountable immediately.**_

Just earlier last week, Cory called for an inter-agency task force under the National Security Council to counter China's anti-American propaganda campaigns. This is just one of the many steps that Cory and fellow Senate Republicans are carrying out - but there is more to be done. _**Will you join the fight? **_ _**
**_
**[**STAND UP TO CHINA - SIGN YOUR NAME**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010CxC_FuiK0_N9HWOF0Pz6fqP_-WXGmkydccW3CpXBxambWX4eOeQhrjIuigALFuqY4FEMkYF_tEF2ZMtyz8Y9HK_JPPLhjoHvNgBepGPFRLXeuHtrHk6W4IAdw-lwR90bh2ZNW6eRQiOqJWYRfXD3aknaWxWfXjWe75QEa4hGiUPp0aDNSHaZKERD2eebhS7AMrFS1ujDMYejPsKxhmU9Oe-2LRUDuRMEKHpac16ZiXDqeOWizc641ZmKq3iG3khFWkqM2MSCZuLq4C8PGaaJxE0B9oPGOGBjirnJ_V4G3ZyAfukl6kqe4-23UmBVpLglVsubbgJekE3l0WvnjesCqJSboxhyEVgdWg5SHVoFF4=&c=7_1nLGSmERGY8USvHOWaMYNJ4mMj1a5jDZK6MsCaIFIiz4QwJPnk9A==&ch=mI20LHEzfPt74k4fG-BzUNJzTPlHTopgJOURGz-3sDl75uxv4T0b5Q==)**
---

Thanks in advance for signing your name to stand up to China's Communist government.
_PS: As always, please stay home and help us flatten the curve of transmission with this virus. Make sure to continue to look out for your neighbors and loved ones as we weather this battle. America 's future relies on the commitment of ALL Americans to follow social distancing guidelines at the direction of healthcare professionals. So remember to stay safe and stay home._

**

** PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE

name: Martin (Team Young)
subject: Scrambling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
The Democrats are now forced to admit what we've always known is true -- we can (and will) flip this seat RED in November.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xk-NDZLTBEt3z-4xFQRntXzyKOipaOAY0Y3PXdUPf-wbAc0ZcPfj-bhxa6csL48lxz8LuvFeMexINmly7BXqp08J8VkMWUcVgp4pimSfNLF17p0g2LnpF5Rkl3a69v-eMFUJjatMyHlNRJ_dYRmz-LdswyHuNw8tEEK4n3kXeZjZqs9VTY6-MbqP34dxap8fFux4SGcQbJ5b7u9kJAvHFSDsc5P_cmCQsRYWJG812TXj71I_T7ITp1Vw97btaO8aiBSHfSMVGcvOvDk8THM8GjQUSscvvQ3JIKxSOAMtzijCgwCLPNQx_IiOsfW-X0pO_lmLMh79getiS_-l5eBdkGv2M9vLoGXPpu1o9jn-e62UrCb3yKsgZPM6aIFjlDDL&c=xVHiDH9FAWhzewymyfz3W6CJ4q7kQPLxUzv3IdyFnHhkDR-7bjMoYA==&ch=ft8XzEn_2hxIeoLrW1cmO9ZpKqDt7OccHi6APmh_COgEIc-dJHUzDA==) Friend, the Democrats have been scrambling ever since we came out ahead on Election Night. Now they have to admit what we've always known is true -- we can (and will) flip this seat RED. **[FLIP THIS MUST-WIN SEAT RED](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xk-NDZLTBEt3z-4xFQRntXzyKOipaOAY0Y3PXdUPf-wbAc0ZcPfj-bhxa6csL48lxz8LuvFeMexINmly7BXqp08J8VkMWUcVgp4pimSfNLF17p0g2LnpF5Rkl3a69v-eMFUJjatMyHlNRJ_dYRmz-LdswyHuNw8tEEK4n3kXeZjZqs9VTY6-MbqP34dxap8fFux4SGcQbJ5b7u9kJAvHFSDsc5P_cmCQsRYWJG812TXj71I_T7ITp1Vw97btaO8aiBSHfSMVGcvOvDk8THM8GjQUSscvvQ3JIKxSOAMtzijCgwCLPNQx_IiOsfW-X0pO_lmLMh79getiS_-l5eBdkGv2M9vLoGXPpu1o9jn-e62UrCb3yKsgZPM6aIFjlDDL&c=xVHiDH9FAWhzewymyfz3W6CJ4q7kQPLxUzv3IdyFnHhkDR-7bjMoYA==&ch=ft8XzEn_2hxIeoLrW1cmO9ZpKqDt7OccHi6APmh_COgEIc-dJHUzDA==)** This is going to be one of the toughest races in the country. Gil Cisneros spent millions of his lottery winnings to defeat us in 2018 and the Democrats are prepared to spend millions more to keep conservative voices out of California again. Unlike our self-funded opponent, we're running a grassroots campaign. That means we rely on people like you chipping in small amounts whenever you can to get us to the finish line. [**Can we count on you to chip in $5 or even just $1 to keep our movement building? Without winning this seat, a Republican majority is all but impossible.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xk-NDZLTBEt3z-4xFQRntXzyKOipaOAY0Y3PXdUPf-wbAc0ZcPfj-bhxa6csL48lxz8LuvFeMexINmly7BXqp08J8VkMWUcVgp4pimSfNLF17p0g2LnpF5Rkl3a69v-eMFUJjatMyHlNRJ_dYRmz-LdswyHuNw8tEEK4n3kXeZjZqs9VTY6-MbqP34dxap8fFux4SGcQbJ5b7u9kJAvHFSDsc5P_cmCQsRYWJG812TXj71I_T7ITp1Vw97btaO8aiBSHfSMVGcvOvDk8THM8GjQUSscvvQ3JIKxSOAMtzijCgwCLPNQx_IiOsfW-X0pO_lmLMh79getiS_-l5eBdkGv2M9vLoGXPpu1o9jn-e62UrCb3yKsgZPM6aIFjlDDL&c=xVHiDH9FAWhzewymyfz3W6CJ4q7kQPLxUzv3IdyFnHhkDR-7bjMoYA==&ch=ft8XzEn_2hxIeoLrW1cmO9ZpKqDt7OccHi6APmh_COgEIc-dJHUzDA==)

Victory is within reach, but we can only get there by working together.

Thank you,

Martin
Team Young

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: 🚨 Please don’t delay.. 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
Since I first reached out two days ago filling you in on what my campaign is currently facing, my team and I have been blown away by the response of p Peter, Since I first reached out two days ago filling you in on what my campaign is currently facing, my team and I have been blown away by the response of people from all over our district who refuse to let a far-left Democrat control this seat.
I’ve heard far and wide about how passionate you are about protecting our constitutional rights including our freedoms of speech, the second amendment, and more.
I’m committed to ensuring that our conservative values are represented in DC once I am elected in November.
But Peter, before we can look to our general election, we must make it through our primary election that was just postponed.

name: Booker for Senate
subject: Before midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
Here's where we're at |
#
Team -- Earlier this year, Mitch McConnell and other Republican dark-money donor groups pledged to spend millions of dollars in order to keep their hold on the Senate. A lot has changed since then but their efforts to expand their majority in the Senate have not. One of the most important steps we can take to stop the spread of the coronavirus is to observe social distancing guidance. Our campaign takes these recommendations seriously which is why we've switched to working from home and have canceled all in-person fundraisers until further notice. But that's made emails like these an even more important tool when it comes to getting the resources we'll need to run a campaign that will win come this November. So we're asking: **If you can, and only if you can, would you make a contribution of any amount towards our mid-April fundraising goal? The deadline expires at midnight and a donation of any amount would be greatly appreciated.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200415-mm?refcode=cab-em-200415-mm&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

| [Chip in $100 now ](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200415-mm?refcode=cab-em-200415-mm&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Chip in $250 now ](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200415-mm?refcode=cab-em-200415-mm&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| [Another Amount ](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200415-mm?refcode=cab-em-200415-mm&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
We say this a lot but only because it's true: grassroots supporters and donors are the beating heart of this campaign. Cory will never accept a dime from federal lobbyists or corporate PACs so we rely on emails just like these to fuel our movement. We set monthly goals for our digital fundraising program at the beginning of each month, but with the public health crisis, we've had to adjust those goals upwards even more in order to make up the difference.
As always, you can be sure the team will be working every day to stretch each one of your hard-earned dollars as far as it will go to keep Cory in the Senate and help the Democrats take back the majority.
Just opening these emails means a lot to Cory and the team, and we understand you may not be able to donate every time we ask. If you can't contribute today, consider forwarding this email to five friends instead.
Thanks for all you do,
Booker for Senate
_We know this is a tough time for everyone and we mean it when we ask that you only donate if you 're able to. Above all, please focus on keeping you and your loved ones safe and healthy. If you'd like to receive fewer emails during this public health crisis, [please click here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e69/5fca0d19/7a6ec94c/291d6f16/3190170379/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e63/5fc1cc3d/7a69868f/291d116f/2423886864/VEsHBg/?g=E6VsCOqMaklZqPW1SKlhKSA")._

name: MJ Hegar Health Care Team
subject: Sen. Cornyn's "accomplishments"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Do these look like the accomplishments of someone we want representing us in the Senate?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890346/7f51f7bc/4f5004f1/4ef12aba/690446372/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890346/7f51f7bc/4f5004f1/4ef12ab9/690446372/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?refcode=email_20200415.2nd__1226__&amount=10")
---
Sen. Cornyn's record on health care is ABYSMAL, Peter! Let's go over some of his health care **" accomplishments"** from his career in public office, including his 18 years in the Senate.
**Sen. Cornyn has:**
* **Voted 20 times to repeal or defund the Affordable Care Act and rip health insurance away from vulnerable Texans.**
* Voted to allow insurance companies to charge people with pre-existing conditions more for coverage, pricing them out of the health insurance market.
* Voted to allow insurance companies to charge older Texans up to 5 times more for health care coverage.
* And he vowed to block a bipartisan House bill to lower prescription drug costs.

---
Do these look like the accomplishments of someone we want representing us in the Senate? **We need MJ instead: a combat veteran and working mom who understands the realities of our health care system.**
**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890346/7f51f7bc/4f5004f1/4ef12ab9/690446372/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?refcode=email_20200415.2nd__1226__&amount=10")**
MJ gets that the current system isn't working for regular families, and that's why she'll fight to **expand health care coverage with a public option**. But first she needs to win this election -- and that won't happen without you. **If you can, please help us reach our Mid-Month Goal of $25,000!**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

clean_body: Do these look like the accomplishments of someone we want representing us in the Senate? | "" | | | "" Sen. Cornyn's record on health care is ABYSMAL, Peter! Let's go over some of his health care " accomplishments" from his career in public office, including his 18 years in the Senate. Sen. Cornyn has: Voted 20 times to repeal or defund the Affordable Care Act and rip health insurance away from vulnerable Texans. Voted to allow insurance companies to charge people with pre-existing conditions more for coverage, pricing them out of the health insurance market. Voted to allow insurance companies to charge older Texans up to 5 times more for health care coverage. And he vowed to block a bipartisan House bill to lower prescription drug costs. Do these look like the accomplishments of someone we want representing us in the Senate? We need MJ instead: a combat veteran and working mom who understands the realities of our health care system. "" MJ gets that the current system isn't working for regular families, and that's why she'll fight to expand health care coverage with a public option. name: Booker for Senate
subject: Asking for you to chip in to keep our campaign going
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
Here's where we're at |
#
Team -- Earlier this year, Mitch McConnell and other Republican dark-money donor groups pledged to spend millions of dollars in order to keep their hold on the Senate. A lot has changed since then but their efforts to expand their majority in the Senate have not. One of the most important steps we can take to stop the spread of the coronavirus is to observe social distancing guidance. Our campaign takes these recommendations seriously which is why we've switched to working from home and have canceled all in-person fundraisers until further notice. But that's made emails like these an even more important tool when it comes to getting the resources we'll need to run a campaign that will win come this November. So we're asking: **If you can, and only if you can, would you make a contribution of any amount towards our mid-April fundraising goal? The deadline expires at midnight and a donation of any amount would be greatly appreciated.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200415-mm?refcode=cab-em-200415-mm&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

| | [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200415-mm?refcode=cab-em-200415-mm&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")

| [ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200415-mm?refcode=cab-em-200415-mm&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
We say this a lot but only because it's true: grassroots supporters and donors are the beating heart of this campaign. Cory will never accept a dime from federal lobbyists or corporate PACs so we rely on emails just like these to fuel our movement. We set monthly goals for our digital fundraising program at the beginning of each month, but with the public health crisis, we've had to adjust those goals upwards even more in order to make up the difference.
As always, you can be sure the team will be working every day to stretch each one of your hard-earned dollars as far as it will go to keep Cory in the Senate and help the Democrats take back the majority.
Just opening these emails means a lot to Cory and the team, and we understand you may not be able to donate every time we ask. If you can't contribute today, consider forwarding this email to five friends instead.
Thanks for all you do,
Booker for Senate
_We know this is a tough time for everyone and we mean it when we ask that you only donate if you 're able to. Above all, please focus on keeping you and your loved ones safe and healthy. If you'd like to receive fewer emails during this public health crisis, [please click here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e6a/5fca0d19/7d937a57/291d6fb3/1903279426/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e63/5fc1cc3d/7a69868f/291d116f/2423886864/VEsHBg/?g=E6VsCOqMaklZqPW1SKlhKSA")._

PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE

We have a serious problem on our hands -- Nancy Pelosi has started pulling out all stops to try to take down our campaign. Rob, Team Turner

Hitting this goal is make-or-break. Democrats are prepared to spend millions to hold this seat so they can keep Nancy Pelosi's majority and push her anti-Trump agenda. We can't let that happen.
That's why I've been authorized to activate a [DOUBLE MATCH](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YVQehqjc8u-RXqJnOKH8fHDbFokjNRICxaBEQrJiJX5rwlWWN0UMUIcMtXEDQyWZdNuUhCSxOZepPxZQDa472vYhWszih615zvrCcqureoupxhuwB64HLr4l9g3J0DXErmtUF7Mh8lcLxNAmjsFNeglAstcaWHbcXPXlN89kKEzt3yuU3XfMu4l_SoaX0y05&c=zI8XYVzUrC0KJPTirQUozo6I8Gr3pkO1Wg_WGdq-tNClcfr42sKcHw==&ch=MvhFFIz6hCOyLJFuGE9gA5B0Pl_NqB5lK0-lTHN7_sM5Wo9k5UYCvQ==) to help get us there. | Team, President Trump is once again looking to get rid of leaders who speak truth to power. **This time, it 's Dr. Anthony Fauci.** Time and time again, Dr. Fauci has delivered science-based facts and information about COVID-19 directly to the American people, and he hasn't been afraid to contradict those spreading dangerous misinformation. **But now, President Trump has publicly hinted he might fire Dr. Fauci. If this happens, President Trump would appear to value reopening the economy more than protecting American lives.[Will you join us in thanking Dr. Fauci for his work and let him know we stand with him? Then forward this email to a friend to double your impact!](https://act.myngp.com/el/QAk6DLvC5bRrXCD9tOMd6nhLY2qJYCrZ_pNjY2aWYpo=/KaNtvg-SPPYarjRkVv0SCsLGcLYWJ3_ganIFsdvwUNE=)** | **[THANK DR. FAUCI»](https://act.myngp.com/el/QAk6DLvC5bRrXCD9tOMd6nhLY2qJYCrZ_pNjY2aWYpo=/KaNtvg-SPPYarjRkVv0SCsLGcLYWJ3_ganIFsdvwUNE=)**
---
The President spent the critical early weeks of the COVID-19 pandemic downplaying its severity, undermining health experts and spreading misinformation, and preventing states from taking action to protect their residents.
**In the absence of a true leader, Dr. Fauci stepped up.** It can't have been easy to be an outspoken advocate while the President himself was actively downplaying the impacts of the virus, but Dr. Fauci consistently put the health, safety, and wellbeing of the American people above all else.
[**That 's why we stand with Dr. Fauci. Will you sign the petition to help us thank Dr. Fauci, and then forward this email to a friend to help amplify your impact?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/QAk6DLvC5bRrXCD9tOMd6nhLY2qJYCrZ_pNjY2aWYpo=/KaNtvg-SPPYarjRkVv0SCsLGcLYWJ3_ganIFsdvwUNE=)

---
We've all relied on Fauci's fact-based information these past few weeks, and it's critical that we don't lose his voice in this crisis.
Thanks,
\--Team Green

subject: Help Us Meet Our Goal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
# I Need Your Help Today!
As you know, running a campaign during the Covid-19 outbreak is a very difficult task. Normally, I would be spending my days attending Lincoln-Reagan Day dinners, knocking on doors, and planning meet and greets and fundraisers for Troy.

**But, just because we're living in unprecedented times doesn't mean we don't have an election to win. Tonight at Midnight is our fundraising deadline and we are so close to reaching our goal.
Will you Donate Today?**

Troy has gone to work producing hand sanitizer for our communities and first responders. Just yesterday, Troy travelled to Fromberg, Billings, and Crow Agency to deliver hand sanitizer.

On the campaign front, we've gone digital. Getting aggressive sharing Troy's message of transparency, open markets, and his vast experience in both the Insurance and Securities industries on social media.

As we near the time where budgets need to be finalized and voter contact plans approved we need your help now more than ever.
I know times are hard, but we have to keep funding this campaign.

**If you can, please donate before midnight today. **

Best,
Sam Loveridge
Campaign Manager

name: Tanesha Booker
subject: I know how much this means to Charles
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
My name is Tanesha — I’m Charles’ wife. I couldn’t be more proud of Charles and the movement he’s built here in Kentucky. It’s been incredible to see the hope it gives people when they hear Charles’ story and realize the chance we have this election to finally elect real change in our state.
#
Hi,
My name is Tanesha — I’m Charles’ wife.
I couldn’t be more proud of Charles and the movement he’s built here in Kentucky. It’s been incredible to see the hope it gives people when they hear Charles’ story and realize the chance we have this election to finally elect real change in our state.
His campaign team told me they’re racing to hit a fundraising goal by midnight tonight and that Charles is a little nervous about whether we’re going to make it in time.
****I know how much it would mean to Charles if I helped out, so that’s why I’m reaching out for the first time today. ****
**[As of 7:50 PM EST, the campaign is just a couple of donations short from hitting their $30,000 goal. Will you chip in $5 to make sure that Charles has the funds he needs to defeat Mitch& bring progressive change to Kentucky?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17155395/184511687/939538649?refcode=em20200415-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWE4MmZjMy03NjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YG3PhxJU_XQOAw7dvqJFVcf82GQLkj9CIQAR0VZFQgM=)**
****[Contribute $5.00](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17155396/184511688/939538649?refcode=em20200415-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWE4MmZjMy03NjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YG3PhxJU_XQOAw7dvqJFVcf82GQLkj9CIQAR0VZFQgM=)****
I know how hard Charles will fight for us because I’ve seen the way he’s fought for our family.
Everything he does is in commitment to making sure the future is a better place for our children. He saw the way his parents struggled to make ends meet and has dedicated his life to ending generational poverty and making sure every family has a fair shot at the American Dream.
That’s why when Charles talks about passing Medicare for All, the need for a universal basic income, or economic justice — I know these aren’t just policies to him. **They’re real solutions to the problems he’s witnessed in his life. **
Charles is the change that Kentucky is hungry for. _And it’s becoming clear that Mitch is realizing that too._
**[Will you join Charles’ fight for bold, progressive change in Kentucky? Please chip in $5 before the midnight deadline tonight so the campaign has the funds they need to keep spreading their message to defeat Mitch.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17155397/184511689/939538649?refcode=em20200415-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWE4MmZjMy03NjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YG3PhxJU_XQOAw7dvqJFVcf82GQLkj9CIQAR0VZFQgM=)**
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17155398/184511690/939538649?refcode=em20200415-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWE4MmZjMy03NjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YG3PhxJU_XQOAw7dvqJFVcf82GQLkj9CIQAR0VZFQgM=)****
Thanks,
Tanesha

** **

****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17155399/184511691/939538649?refcode=em20200415-3-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWE4MmZjMy03NjdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YG3PhxJU_XQOAw7dvqJFVcf82GQLkj9CIQAR0VZFQgM=)****

name: Hailey Barringer
subject: A lot has changed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
but some things remain the same for our campaign
|
---

| | Team -- As we've adjusted our routines to keep our communities safe and healthy, a lot has changed for our campaign. We've canceled all our in-person events and are relying more on small-dollar grassroots support to keep our campaign running. But there are some things that have remained the same for our campaign. For one: It's still our mission to send Kathy to Congress to make Washington work for North Carolinians again. And second: Our fundraising goals are still as critical now as they will be in November -- and we have one coming up at midnight tomorrow. [_**The mid-month deadline is tomorrow, and while we understand that not everyone can contribute right now, if you can chip in before tomorrow it would make a huge difference.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d36b/3d199a51/2f7cff7d/7364f3d7/1801057615/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDQxNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200415?refcode=kme200415_m_other&refcode2=17426") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d36b/3d199a51/2f7cff7d/7364f3d7/1801057615/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDQxNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200415?refcode=kme200415_m_other&refcode2=17426")

We still need to reach our fundraising targets so we have enough resources to reach as many voters as possible before November. Even if we can't speak with voters in person right now, we're still making those important connections every day.
And with all of our upcoming events canceled and because Kathy isn't taking any corporate PAC money, there's no doubt this will be a tough challenge. But I've seen this grassroots team overcome big challenges before, and I know we can do it again now -- but we'll need to work together to make it happen.
That's how we're going to reach our fundraising goals. And that's how we're going to make health care more accessible and affordable, improve opportunities and resources for workers and small businesses, and ensure quality education for students whether they're in a physical classroom or a digital classroom.
[_**So if you 're able to chip in, please make a contribution before the mid-month deadline tomorrow.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d36b/3d199a51/2f7cff7d/7364f3d7/1801057615/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDQxNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200415?refcode=kme200415_m_other&refcode2=17426")
Thanks and talk soon,
Hailey

subject: Mike Garcia's campaign released a new ad attacking Christy... and it's just as despicable as you could imagine. We have to act fast -- can you rush a donation right now to make sure we keep our ads on the air so that voters know the truth?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

Mike Garcia's campaign released a new ad attacking Christy... and it's just as despicable as you could imagine.

Not only is this ad full of lies, but their campaign just put nearly $100,000 in new spending to run this and similar ads on TV between now and May 12th.

**[We have to act fast -- can you rush a donation right now to make sure we keep our ads on the air so that voters know the truth?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b899/29776869/a35eab6/569f47aa/2428846927/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTVfbmV3YWQtczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200415_newad-s3")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b899/29776869/a35eab6/569f47ab/2428846927/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTVfbmV3YWQtczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200415_newad-s3&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b899/29776869/a35eab6/569f47a4/2428846927/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTVfbmV3YWQtczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200415_newad-s3&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b899/29776869/a35eab6/569f47a7/2428846927/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTVfbmV3YWQtczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200415_newad-s3&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b899/29776869/a35eab6/569f47aa/2428846927/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTVfbmV3YWQtczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200415_newad-s3")
You and I both know Christy's record. We know her values. She's always had the backs of working families, and that's what she's been doing during this crisis.

That's how we know the type of leader she will be for us in Congress -- and that's why we have to help her fight back against these Republican lies.

**[Can you pitch in $5 or whatever you can right now to make sure we can set the record straight with voters and counter this latest nasty lie-filled GOP attack?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b899/29776869/a35eab6/569f47aa/2428846927/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTVfbmV3YWQtczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200415_newad-s3")**

Thanks for stepping up. We _can't_ let Mike Garcia get away with this.

\-- Kunal

Kunal Atit
