name: James Mackler
subject: Duty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
I'll be honest, we're facing a crisis.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa157/18d6a294/4cb396ea/26d615af/3431958675/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | I have been working from home alongside my wife and two daughters and I'll be honest: It's been difficult to not be on the road -- especially not riding my motorcycle -- because it means I haven't been able to connect with Tennesseans in person as we all navigate these challenging times. That means our online communication is more important than ever, and with so much going on in the country right now, I want to bring it back to why I got into this race in the first place. I was motivated to run for the Senate for reasons similar to the ones that motivated me to join the army after 9/11. When I joined the army, our country was facing a crisis. I felt it was my duty as an American to do more, so I closed my law practice at 30 years old and stepped forward to serve my country. **We 're facing a crisis now, too -- not only a crisis of health and economic security but also a crisis of leadership. Tennessee and our whole country are depending on strong leaders now more than ever.** [_**If you can, chip in before the mid-month deadline tomorrow to send a strong leader to fight for Tennessee in the Senate.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa157/18d6a294/4cb396ea/26d615ac/3431958675/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmRfbSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200415?refcode=jme200415_nd_m&recurring=true") Our leaders in Washington are coming up short. They're letting partisan divisions get in the way of addressing our country's biggest issues -- issues that require timely and decisive action. It's unacceptable -- especially at a time like this. Washington is broken, and I'm running because it's my duty to step forward and serve all Tennesseans in a time of crisis so we can solve the problems holding us back. [_**Please chip in before midnight tomorrow ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa157/18d6a294/4cb396ea/26d615ac/3431958675/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmRfbSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200415?refcode=jme200415_nd_m&recurring=true") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa157/18d6a294/4cb396ea/26d615ad/3431958675/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTUiLCJlM3NnWVhOck1TQjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZF9tIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200415?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jme200415_nd_m_&refcode2=107423")
---
| | [Donate $25](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa157/18d6a294/4cb396ea/26d615aa/3431958675/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTUiLCJlM3NnWVhOck1pQjlmUT09IjoiMjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmRfbSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200415?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jme200415_nd_m_&refcode2=107423")
---
| | [Donate $50](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa157/18d6a294/4cb396ea/26d615ab/3431958675/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTUiLCJlM3NnWVhOck15QjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmRfbSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200415?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jme200415_nd_m_&refcode2=107423")
---
| | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa157/18d6a294/4cb396ea/26d615a8/3431958675/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmRfbSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200415?refcode=jme200415_nd_m_other&refcode2=107423")
---
Pundits say winning in Tennessee will be hard, but I've never shied away from difficult missions. As a combat veteran and a prosecutor, I've spent my entire career tackling tough challenges head-on.
As Tennessee's next senator, I promise to be a strong leader who is honest, direct, accountable, and unafraid. Because that's the kind of leader we need right now.
[_**In order to get there though, I 'm counting on grassroots support. I understand that not all families can afford to make contributions right now, and that's OK, but if you are able to spare a few dollars, please consider chipping in before our mid-month deadline tomorrow.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa157/18d6a294/4cb396ea/26d615ac/3431958675/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmRfbSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200415?refcode=jme200415_nd_m&recurring=true")
In service,
James

name: TinaforMinnesota.com
subject: One last time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
_This is a difficult time for many — so please, only donate if you can. The most important thing you can do is to stay safe and take care of your loved ones. Thank you._
* * *
Folks, we’re reaching out one last time to let you know that we're close (so close!) to hitting our mid-month fundraising goal ahead of the midnight deadline. **Will you pitch in anything you can afford to support Tina Smith’s re-election campaign in Minnesota before the clock runs out? We're THAT close, and your donation might just be the one to put us over the edge. But, please, only chip in if you can afford to do so. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Add your name: Save the Post Office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
**[Sign our urgent petition to demand President Trump and Congress fully fund the United States Postal Service, which is on pace to run out of money due to the economic complications of the coronavirus pandemic.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17155690/184525019/1104248495?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2VlMTY1NC03ZTdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AK0l3UCA5E22epAAOlGusjdcJaQ2wLmVoJ8mc6-FmSA=&emci=7b64b7d8-7d7f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=07ee1654-7e7f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=7280715)** | | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17155691/184525020/1104248495?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2VlMTY1NC03ZTdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AK0l3UCA5E22epAAOlGusjdcJaQ2wLmVoJ8mc6-FmSA=&emci=7b64b7d8-7d7f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=07ee1654-7e7f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=7280715)
---
Folks,
The United States Postal Service is essential to American society. Mail carriers deliver mail, news, ballots, and essential goods like food and life-saving medications through snow, rain, heat, and the dark of night. And yes, a pandemic too.
But right now, the US Postal Service needs our help. This pandemic has hit the USPS hard, and without an immediate influx of funding, it is on track to run out of money soon.
Yet, President Trump and Mitch McConnell have refused calls to fully fund the Postal Service. That’s just wrong.
Millions of Americans -- especially right now -- rely on the Postal Service for essential goods and medicines. And with the pandemic threatening to upend our elections, we need a functioning postal service to enable people across the country to vote by mail this year.
I’m not one to exaggerate, but allowing the USPS to fail would threaten our elections and the health and safety of people across the country, and put hundreds of thousands of people out of work.
**[That’s why I’m asking you to sign my petition demanding President Trump and Congress act quickly to save the United States Postal Service>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17155692/184525021/1104248495?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2VlMTY1NC03ZTdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AK0l3UCA5E22epAAOlGusjdcJaQ2wLmVoJ8mc6-FmSA=&emci=7b64b7d8-7d7f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=07ee1654-7e7f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=7280715)**
| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17155693/184525022/1104248495?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2VlMTY1NC03ZTdmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AK0l3UCA5E22epAAOlGusjdcJaQ2wLmVoJ8mc6-FmSA=&emci=7b64b7d8-7d7f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=07ee1654-7e7f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=7280715)
---
Thank you for raising your voice right now. The USPS is essential to American life, and we cannot let it fail.
— John
Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---
Hickenlooper for Colorado
PO Box 18886
Denver, CO 80218
United States

name: BREAKING POLL
subject: The first time in decades
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| Did you see the news?!

| BREAKING Public Policy Polling:
Dr. Barbara Bollier 44% -- Kris Kobach 42%
---

**It 's clear:** We **CAN** win in Kansas, and we **CAN** flip the Senate.

[Chip in now to help Dr. Bollier WIN in Kansas->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c65/4bd7760e/5a3d5dbe/77af5c38/2467444299/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-bollierpoll?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+now+to+help+Dr+Bollier+WIN+in+Ka&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200415_1MC-1MO_STD_3_Bollierpoll&source=314_EM_FR_200415_1MC-1MO_STD_3_Bollierpoll&refcode=314_EM_FR_200415_1MC-1MO_STD_3_Bollierpoll")

[Chip in Now](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c65/4bd7760e/5a3d5dbe/77af5c07/2467444299/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-bollierpoll?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+Now&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200415_1MC-1MO_STD_3_Bollierpoll&source=314_EM_FR_200415_1MC-1MO_STD_3_Bollierpoll&refcode=314_EM_FR_200415_1MC-1MO_STD_3_Bollierpoll")
---

* * *

Wait, it gets better:

[**>From the Kansas City Star:** "Bollier's impressive haul for the quarter -- a record for a Senate candidate in Kansas of either party -- coincides with polling that shows her in a dead heat with GOP Frontrunner Kris Kobach."](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c65/4bd7760e/5a3d5dbe/77af5c06/2467444299/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-bollierpoll?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+From+the+Kansas+City+Star+ldquoBollierrs&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200415_1MC-1MO_STD_3_Bollierpoll&source=314_EM_FR_200415_1MC-1MO_STD_3_Bollierpoll&refcode=314_EM_FR_200415_1MC-1MO_STD_3_Bollierpoll")
---

Dr. Bollier can flip a Senate seat blue in Kansas for the first time since the Great Depression. But, the GOP is going to do everything in their power to raise dark money to fight back.

Let's not forget about _Kris Kobach._ The same Kris Kobach whose extreme voter suppression tactics and anti-immigration views make him one of the most extreme Senate candidates this cycle.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Making it easier to quarantine or isolate
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
Hello friend,
One of the questions I get the most is what we're doing to help Rhode Islanders who have to quarantine or isolate due to COVID-19. I understand that having to stay apart from the rest of the world can be daunting. For us, it came with a unique set of challenges about making sure that everyone, especially our most vulnerable populations, has access to the resources they need. Today, I want to share with you some of the progress we've made in addressing quarantine and isolation.
First, want to tell you about a change in how we're reporting COVID-19 statistics. The Department of Health has worked around the clock to create [our new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eR0kFdJM0tRA1dfvG__0F6DPjEk-au2w23rhgtWwDcSBiAySdwcnlc0x4R1LeUIar4aUcIrELs50amDzNX79MpPGXrv_yrh29-F4Bn3Q20mrR52XN5r96FlNsQBkq4lcAsqLJZDjvGvGgOaYexyBax5ThPfObHQW5aykp2thx2I20XJ0DG6QLKwKz0OYG8V4SzFEbzv8h3A=&c=tw88PVayYuRnri0rhuMz2egYUpE2oHoIU8MBeBJbOrdBOgsAeWn_KQ==&ch=qQfyOq17aw39RKVT_UkGx5i6WZwK42OnqXTl99ZeFv24q_jW95tiYw==), which has all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
|
---
| More than 6,000 Rhode Islanders are currently in quarantine and isolation, almost all of whom are safely at home. So to help them, we've developed the capability to deliver tens of thousands of meals a day. Over the last month, Meals on Wheels made 32,000 home deliveries - while our senior centers and schools are distributing nearly 22,000 meals a day. These numbers continue to increase. And this week, they will grow again as URI dining services launches its partnership with senior centers, delivering healthy dinners to our older neighbors around the state.
Today I'm proud to announce that we're launching [RIHavens.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eR0kFdJM0tRA1dfvG__0F6DPjEk-au2w23rhgtWwDcSBiAySdwcnlc0x4R1LeUIaJX30dsAzYuK7EnqBCkaznWD2jUrqrJk-GB9O_pZiiuQHt-Acn71v15D9RmbvYbfpzfTxINfwP_k=&c=tw88PVayYuRnri0rhuMz2egYUpE2oHoIU8MBeBJbOrdBOgsAeWn_KQ==&ch=qQfyOq17aw39RKVT_UkGx5i6WZwK42OnqXTl99ZeFv24q_jW95tiYw==) - a new website that connects our first responders, healthcare workers, and others in need of a safe space to quarantine with hotel rooms across the state offered at significantly discounted rates. For example, we've contracted with the Wyndham Hotel in Warwick, which currently has more than 200 beds reserved for people who are homeless or housing insecure.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eR0kFdJM0tRA1dfvG__0F6DPjEk-au2w23rhgtWwDcSBiAySdwcnlc0x4R1LeUIa2WrxzDGrafOqRJOR_t5k8Wwin9s-y84O28gSGvlhyEFrSdOaYjM5GQ_3UeN7y6F8-niGI5qP7P5tTm9-XHUyyxsjQozroDKMcShda11Jw19868zQQlAmUQ5volwCWu4CSGQ4XwH5xD-wYnmL1N3pNNvu9y2tnpZc&c=tw88PVayYuRnri0rhuMz2egYUpE2oHoIU8MBeBJbOrdBOgsAeWn_KQ==&ch=qQfyOq17aw39RKVT_UkGx5i6WZwK42OnqXTl99ZeFv24q_jW95tiYw==)
---
| Click to watch today's update on Rhode Island's COVID-19 response
---
| These steps are helping us address the material needs of Rhode Islanders in quarantine. But there's also a psychological component. Being in quarantine can be lonely, especially for older Rhode Islanders. So the working group, in collaboration with community partners, have developed programs in which people can check in on one another through a daily phone or Zoom call. Over 100 volunteers have already signed up to check in daily with older neighbors through [Project HELLO - and I hope that you'll consider volunteering as well](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eR0kFdJM0tRA1dfvG__0F6DPjEk-au2w23rhgtWwDcSBiAySdwcnlc0x4R1LeUIar5NDvQhcxU3APOhQMRW2DmaexpXShCoNHP4nd0iTtRtv7SbdnCDQohQEkX-jAmH_QmTA6WqzZOagQ1Sv5bMEpX053ZSzhJcmQPt1pR-3SeJzRSP6AN0gyA==&c=tw88PVayYuRnri0rhuMz2egYUpE2oHoIU8MBeBJbOrdBOgsAeWn_KQ==&ch=qQfyOq17aw39RKVT_UkGx5i6WZwK42OnqXTl99ZeFv24q_jW95tiYw==).
Of course, not every person in need has a device with which to video chat. Kaya Suner a 19-year-old Providence resident saw this need and immediately looked for a way to help. He partnered with the Rhode Island Medical Society to create COVID Connectors, a program that allows anyone to donate iPads, iPhones and laptops to Rhode Island hospitals. If you have a device you're willing to donate, [please go to covidconnectors.org today](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eR0kFdJM0tRA1dfvG__0F6DPjEk-au2w23rhgtWwDcSBiAySdwcnlc0x4R1LeUIaY63qMeUA2YODa4XGBLx7SAPhmTy6yEUXjNRQ5yoxTB0rb5rz4BEfX9h-tUhclBwbe6IPUlVci42i3ibfSNWf6Q==&c=tw88PVayYuRnri0rhuMz2egYUpE2oHoIU8MBeBJbOrdBOgsAeWn_KQ==&ch=qQfyOq17aw39RKVT_UkGx5i6WZwK42OnqXTl99ZeFv24q_jW95tiYw==). I'm personally donating an iPad to the effort as well.
I'm inspired by stories like these every day from Rhode Islanders who are innovating and rising to the challenges.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eR0kFdJM0tRA1dfvG__0F6DPjEk-au2w23rhgtWwDcSBiAySdwcnlc0x4R1LeUIaB9o0aLnA0zst-ACG4XezVeE6iACIKdBEOCI7EV3557Uov4f9irtrERGGep-NbvucXpJgeHUG2EUYK0rm-8dSLW0Uf7g1c7EpEZpejqjsIIfnSDtt5qlzPwIEOpnGMonCevu0PYLuF_vvevAOy7V3h-s13TomHRiIai7Cb5zuvhcbDYGNy8RCWVz1Y71zS4eoJkjy-ODh1aFh2BuoGSwDd9xITuYnYvdoWWWWmF4AeNQ2JFroPItcufB6rWteK92iY6Y2CjwRmhM=&c=tw88PVayYuRnri0rhuMz2egYUpE2oHoIU8MBeBJbOrdBOgsAeWn_KQ==&ch=qQfyOq17aw39RKVT_UkGx5i6WZwK42OnqXTl99ZeFv24q_jW95tiYw==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=d4ab4df2-67b6-4e18-9d74-acd9e695566a)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=d4ab4df2-67b6-4e18-9d74-acd9e695566a) | [About Constant Contact](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/about-constant-contact)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with
| [ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)
---
[Try email marketing for free today!](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)

The Associated Press confirmed that for six days in January, the Chinese Communist Party covered up the virus which is now wreaking havoc across the globe.

Even worse, as China knew the pandemic was spreading, large events continued to be held across Wuhan.

China is responsible for this.

If they had taken decisive action to slow the spread, lives would have been saved and the world would have been better prepared for the China virus.

While China was hiding key details of the virus and its spread, the World Health Organization was downplaying the risks -- at the behest of China!

The Chinese Communist Party and the World Health Organization need to be held accountable.

We must ensure that something like this never happens again!
Sign my petition to immediately investigate the ties between the Chinese Communist Party and the World Health Organization. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDIyNzI4MTUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTY0MDYwMQS2&mt=1&rt=0
Even today, China refuses to release real data about the impact of the virus. The World Health Organization is more interested in attacking Taiwan then helping address this pandemic.
Sign my petition to immediately investigate the ties between the Chinese Communist Party and the World Health Organization. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDIyNzI4MTUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTY0MDYwMQS2&mt=1&rt=0 In service,

Tom

China is responsible for this.Click here to unsubscribe Peter, The Associated Press confirmed that for six days in January, the Chinese Communist Party covered up the virus which is now wreaking havoc across the globe. Even worse, as China knew the pandemic was spreading, large events continued to be held across Wuhan. China is responsible for this. If they had taken decisive action to slow the spread, lives would have been saved and the world would have been better prepared for the China virus. While China was hiding key details of the virus and its spread, the World Health Organization was downplaying the risks -- at the behest of China! The Chinese Communist Party and the World Health Organization need to be held accountable. We must ensure that something like this never happens again! Sign my petition to immediately investigate the ties between the Chinese Communist Party and the World Health Organization. Even today, China refuses to release real data about the impact of the virus. The World Health Organization is more interested in attacking Taiwan then helping address this pandemic. Sign my petition to immediately investigate the ties between the Chinese Communist Party and the World Health Organization. name: Joe Biden
subject: I'd be honored if you joined my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Hey there. I'm Joe Biden, and I'd like to earn your vote. You may have seen this morning that Senator Warren endorsed our campaign. It's an endorsement that I am grateful for -- and one I don't... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b2/45c30650/1f5f3e15e/66e961a4/2671939381/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Hey there. I'm Joe Biden, and I'd like to earn your vote.

You may have seen this morning that Senator Warren endorsed our campaign. It's an endorsement that I am grateful for -- and one I don't take lightly. Her courage, tenacity, and persistence shed a light on some of the most important issues facing our country -- and has made a real difference in people's lives. The plans -- and the people who organized for them -- changed this race, the conversation, our party, and the country.

You know, primaries can often put a magnifying glass on small differences and bury broad consensus. Elizabeth and I believe at our cores Wall Street didn't build this country, the middle class did. And it's time our government worked harder for the middle class, but to do that we can demand nothing less than _"big, structural change."_

I know a lot of you feel that way. Some of you have been with Elizabeth since the beginning of her campaign. Together, you built one of the most impressive grassroots movements in the history of politics -- $5 and $10 at a time. You took on corruption. You fought big fights. And you pushed for big ideas.

I know, for some of you, that you might be skeptical of me or my campaign. I understand that. But I intend to earn your votes. And I intend to earn your trust.

I'm here to tell you that you're not only welcome as part of this campaign: you're needed.

The only way that we'll defeat Donald Trump is with a broad coalition of folks working together to win what I have been calling a battle for the soul of our nation.

**I'm not here to ask you for money -- I believe I need to earn it. So I'm asking if you will look me over, give me a chance, and join my campaign.** | [**I'M IN FOR JOE'S CAMPAIGN ➞**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b2/45c30650/1f5f3e15e/66e961a7/2671939381/VEsE/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/join-team-joe-ew?source=JB_IMPORT_SWAP_2020.04.15_X_WARREN_X__X__EW-list")
---
When I say "winning a battle for the soul of our nation" people often misunderstand me. I'm not being nostalgic. I'm not trying to take us back to a country that never existed. The foundational principles of our country -- that all men are created equal -- are ones that we've never lived up to. But we've never given up trying to live up to them.

America wasn't built by Wall Street. It was forged by working people -- strivers, looking for their chance to get ahead. People like you, doing the work to make our country a better place.

It is not enough to "go back" to anything. We have to take immediate, bold action to tackle the climate crisis (and if you don't know, I wrote one of the first bills on climate change). We have to relieve a generation of the crushing burden of student debt. We have to make health care a right and not a privilege. And to get there, we're going to need millions of grassroots supporters to take action right away.

If you join our campaign, we will not just defeat Donald Trump. We will not just win the battle for the soul of our nation. We will transform it too.

To close, I will humbly ask:

**Will you join my campaign today? I'd be honored if you did:**
[**I'M IN FOR JOE'S CAMPAIGN ➞**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b2/45c30650/1f5f3e15e/66e961a7/2671939381/VEsF/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/join-team-joe-ew?source=JB_IMPORT_SWAP_2020.04.15_X_WARREN_X__X__EW-list")
---
Thank you for everything,

Joe Biden

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b2/45c30650/1f5f3e15e/66e961a6/2671939381/VEsC/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b2/45c30650/1f5f3e15e/66e961a9/2671939381/VEsD/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b2/45c30650/1f5f3e15e/66e961a8/2671939381/VEsA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b2/45c30650/1f5f3e15e/66e961ab/2671939381/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b2/45c30650/1f5f3e15e/66e961aa/2671939381/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b2/45c30650/1f5f3e15e/66e961ad/2671939381/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")
---|---|---|---|---|---
| Paid for by Warren Democrats
---

PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
We'll miss you, but you can always [unsubscribe](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257b2/45c30650/1f5f3e15e/66e961ac/2671939381/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Sen. Cornyn hasn't had to live with his votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I decided to get in this race because Sen. Cornyn doesn't get it.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890343/7f51f7bc/4f553d23/4ef12ca5/1143435325/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, this pandemic has underscored just how desperately we need a Senator who will look out for ALL Texans. **Sen. Cornyn has done everything he can to try to get rid of the Affordable Care Act, the bedrock of health care protections for millions of vulnerable Texans.**

HE doesn't have to deal with the fallout -- he's been in political office for 36 years straight, and he doesn't have to worry about being turned away for having a pre-existing condition. **[We need him out of the Senate so we can protect and expand health care coverage -- and I need your help to make that happen.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890343/7f51f7bc/4f553d23/4ef12ca4/1143435325/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?refcode=email_20200415.3nd__1228__&amount=10")** **[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890343/7f51f7bc/4f553d23/4ef12ca4/1143435325/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?refcode=email_20200415.3nd__1228__&amount=10")** I was shot down in Afghanistan, and then needed two blood transfusions during childbirth, so **I know how important it is that people are able to see a doctor and get the care they need** \-- _without_ worrying about breaking the bank. **Before we had the Affordable Care Act, it was legal for insurance companies to charge women more than men for the exact same insurance.** Sen. Cornyn doesn't mind going back to a time before we had the ACA -- he doesn't have to deal with the fallout.

I decided to get in this race because Sen. Cornyn doesn't get it. Maybe it's because he's been on a government payroll for nearly four decades straight, or maybe he's just ignoring it because he's in the pockets of Big Pharma and the insurance industry -- either way, I need your help to beat him. **Will you donate, if you 're able, to help us reach our $25,000 Mid-Month Goal?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890343/7f51f7bc/4f553d23/4ef12c9b/1143435325/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200415.3nd__1228__&amount=5")**

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890343/7f51f7bc/4f553d23/4ef12c99/1143435325/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200415.3nd__1228__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890343/7f51f7bc/4f553d23/4ef12c98/1143435325/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200415.3nd__1228__&amount=50")**

\-- MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890343/7f51f7bc/4f553d23/4ef12ca4/1143435325/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?refcode=email_20200415.3nd__1228__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890343/7f51f7bc/4f553d23/4ef12c9e/1143435325/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1228&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890343/7f51f7bc/4f553d23/4ef12c9d/1143435325/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

clean_body: I decided to get in this race because Sen. Cornyn doesn't get it. | "" | | Peter, this pandemic has underscored just how desperately we need a Senator who will look out for ALL Texans. Sen. Cornyn has done everything he can to try to get rid of the Affordable Care Act, the bedrock of health care protections for millions of vulnerable Texans. HE doesn't have to deal with the fallout -- he's been in political office for 36 years straight, and he doesn't have to worry about being turned away for having a pre-existing condition. "" "" I was shot down in Afghanistan, and then needed two blood transfusions during childbirth, so I know how important it is that people are able to see a doctor and get the care they need \-- without worrying about breaking the bank. Before we had the Affordable Care Act, it was legal for insurance companies to charge women more than men for the exact same insurance. Sen. Cornyn doesn't mind going back to a time before we had the ACA -- he doesn't have to deal with the fallout. I decided to get in this race because Sen. Cornyn doesn't get it. Maybe it's because he's been on a government payroll for nearly four decades straight, or maybe he's just ignoring it because he's in the pockets of Big Pharma and the insurance industry -- either way, I need your help to beat him. Will you donate, if you 're able, to help us reach our $25,000 Mid-Month Goal? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" \-- MJ "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. name: Nikki Foster
subject: how much does a vote cost?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ce1a/30a4f917/50a4592c/28cd317f/3033720563/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200415_VoteCost_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200415_VoteCost_U2_X1")

| | How much does a vote cost? Nothing -- it's supposed to be a fundamental right. But the truth is, when a new voting system is implemented during a national crisis, it won't be perfect. **And it does cost money to make sure everyone knows how to exercise that fundamental right** \-- even though it shouldn't. I will do whatever it takes to empower everyone to vote -- but I don't have an endless bank account like Steve Chabot. My family is struggling like so many others -- I can't pour money into my campaign. **I 'm running an entirely grassroots operation with no corporate PAC money** \-- because I can't be bought by special interests and I'll never lose track of those I'm tasked with representing. That's why I'm reaching out -- our election ends in less than two weeks. [**Will you pitch in to help us hit our vital goal and protect our democracy? We only need about $1,200 by the end of the night.**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ce1a/30a4f917/50a4592c/28cd317e/3033720563/VEsE/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_april?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200415_VoteCost_U2_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+pitch+in+to+help+us+hit+our+vit&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200415_VoteCost_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200415_VoteCost_U2_X1") With your help, we can bring back the leadership Ohioians deserve and move forward together. Thank you so much, Nikki
---

|
---
| Nikki Foster is a US Air Force veteran, a working mom, and a Democrat running for Congress in Ohio's 1st congressional district.
---

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: you can see the best of Indiana (from your couch)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
For One Indiana this week, we’re taking you on a tour of some of the best virtual experiences in Indiana Friend,

Hoosiers are hunkering down, spending time at home, and we’re seeing it make a big difference in keeping Hoosiers across our state safe and healthy.

But staying home is also keeping us from visiting so many of the places in Indiana we love — churches, museums, legendary sporting venues and many more.
**So for One Indiana this week, we’re taking you on a tour of some of the best virtual experiences in Indiana — check out our list.**
* **[Children's Museum of Indianapolis At Home](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a6d620c49cd34192b1bc6da11c230e7d&_e=VIxs3MZrEa9DwkEVI5R6p1kAhVUvX0Eq2_wtoVKnZXOQcLkh3YeNKPn8TRw15npgbNzH89lvLHhvcGnrwdwxTudUrlQEGgw6KfLtRIUfe2JGbHRQepdjyC3B1InECI76ol5PIjhNquHAjuuILl-W6So4J0v5rTYK5bPm4E4AvKgz1y9DF1pWleBR87TIuH9zgTcmCWJ02SNVG-24pIRykQwby4-UUH4-p-BdIcmKQXolKLGPbIcxwHd_ULZ5q77imeJWf8kUvwXF7CnrsXyp6oJw7Robk6UZam1Rg9fIKyppB1AziWwbb29UDAnXbPhRBxsGjX-c4c-Ykx3tAInTWFIftBXcz5ty5men4vTq0goeGGHsbKkQPOwQjyjLJYvd5OUQg_UBl4wvlzTmeeKro172ZlFqGLda0qEy9ROHiU0%3D)(Marion County)** \- You can find videos covering everything from story time to science lessons, or tune in for a live chat with a dinosaur expert!
* **[Eskenazi Museum of Art 360 Tour](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a6d620c49cd34192b1bc6da11c230e7d&_e=VIxs3MZrEa9DwkEVI5R6p2eoo49HV_g-sdQIQadCFluwUtLyWiW1vkpDYqnqFNxo9ABhN9Hbae2zJ8uRpk9jgqfJ_o9AWMVAxcf6wx2Ha4f5814LF8_kUUWwkd2h5OE2N8e2hPLxYXZIF9CD2nneep24qFERL2zvRevW3QEzmPUQekXAuJOQpGOYjXQibIovxCTX6XDmyAHKBwSP7Vy4wFlEJHskVniRL4pik9A8JHgNz1jGyOV_MfyB98arCCoy3lDKBqszUVngxBhOw_iMWXK9slRYhYcjDmUu5xhA1R5N63s61NQewMgzuJ5BBN1tbcEe1D7A1yMnW9LZGT4Ej0gEqjdwrziFvaHx3HIkr4EVCJIX-UmP8qCJoKirR8y9ugcfOaEu6BvSSadYXNXuJA%3D%3D) (Monroe County)** \- You can visit IU and tour this beautiful building, designed by world-famous architect I.M. Pei.

subject: The left is hoping you don’t remember . . .
body:
President Trump and many governors, Republican and Democrat, are focused on getting America through this global pandemic and back to work safely. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1df985138a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 15, 2020
---
| | |
# **The left is hoping you don’t remember . . .**

**President Trump** and many governors, Republican and Democrat, are focused on getting America through this global pandemic and back to work safely. The left’s political class, meanwhile, is fixated on something else: dividing Americans for partisan gain.

**The difference** is that real leaders want results. Many are [working with the President](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cd4fddfe0b&e=3ee4985eea) to achieve just that. Media pundits and Democrat leaders in Congress, on the other hand, are in the business of manufacturing conflict. They lose out if Americans unite.

**Yet the left botched** the Coronavirus story again and again. Now, they blame the President and hope you don’t remember how they fought him every step of the way:

* **The President formed** a Coronavirus Task Force on _January 29_ , when there were just a handful of confirmed cases in the United States. That day, _The New York Times_ warned its readers to “[beware the pandemic panic](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f21a40649a&e=3ee4985eea).” By the next day, Democrats were busy [fighting each other ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=50488094c1&e=3ee4985eea)over the impeachment spotlight.

* **President Trump** restricted travel from China two days later. Democrat leaders called the ban [“xenophobic” and unnecessary](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ece10f52c1&e=3ee4985eea). _The Washington Post_ published a piece that day: “How our brains make coronavirus seem scarier than it is.”

* **In an Oval Office address** on March 11, President Trump spoke about the U.S. response and announced travel restrictions from Europe. Speaker Nancy Pelosi joined the media and other Democrats in [questioning the action](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a7686701a3&e=3ee4985eea): “We’ll see whether it’s worth the trouble.”

* **The Trump Administration** negotiated with Congress later in March to get immediate relief for working Americans through the bipartisan CARES Act. Speaker Pelosi and House Democrats stalled the Senate bill with their own list of demands—filled with partisan items that had [nothing to do with Coronavirus](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=64801a9a64&e=3ee4985eea).

**There are more examples,** but the pattern is clear: The left attacks President Trump for overreacting to Coronavirus, then later claims he didn’t do enough. It’s a classic Washington stunt, but it won’t work this time. Americans have [seen these tricks before](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=86b7d56fe4&e=3ee4985eea).

🎬 [President Trump followed recommendations of health experts without delay](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eb6496f16c&e=3ee4985eea)

**WATCH:** [Media minimized Coronavirus from the start](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7b3cbdc419&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump is holding the WHO accountable**

**American taxpayers** send $400-500 million to the World Health Organization each year. China, with its 1.4 billion people, contributes about one-tenth of that amount.

**The U.S. foots the bill,** and here is what it receives in return: A WHO response to the Coronavirus outbreak that has been filled with one misstep and cover-up after another.

**The WHO** repeatedly parroted the Chinese government’s claims that the virus was not spreading between humans, despite dire warnings from doctors and health officials. When Taiwan contacted the WHO in December after seeing reports of human-to-human transmission, the WHO cowered to China and kept it from the public.

🎬 **President Trump:** [WHO failed when it mattered most](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7b50ae3c9b&e=3ee4985eea)

**In addition** to covering for the Chinese Communist Party, the WHO went out of its way to attack U.S. officials working to contain the virus. WHO leaders voiced strong opposition to travel restrictions from China and other countries, despite applauding travel restrictions _within China itself_. That led to further spread of the virus globally.

**On February 24** , President Trump requested $2.5 billion from Congress in emergency funds to fight the virus. That same day, the WHO insisted [Coronavirus was not a pandemic](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f7ca7da113&e=3ee4985eea)—and chillingly praised China’s government for getting it under control.

**In a global health crisis** , telling the truth is a matter of life and death. In this basic duty, the WHO failed. Until these mistakes are acknowledged and fixed, President Trump has halted U.S. funding for the organization. “Maybe WHO will reform, and maybe they won’t,” President Trump said. “But we’ll be able to see.”

[“Timeline Proves WHO Helped China Make COVID-19 Pandemic Worse”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2a9b271b76&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬****President Trump:** [We’re reviewing mismanagement and cover-ups ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=16f1e95d7a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Shut your fat, ugly, balding, inbred narrow-jawed neanderthal pigskin face
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
The progressive Dems support the Communist Chinese Party | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/609aea87b244/trump-announces-national-emergency-for-covid-639110?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | Hi friend,

When the enemy launches the most vile and pathetic attempts at personal attacks, I press onward. When the enemy becomes more vocal with each passing day, I don’t back down.

“You are the devil reincarnated if you put that kind of horrible ad in the public.”

You didn’t misread that. That was one of the emails I received last week from a Democrat. The **progressive** and **socialist** **Democrats** are up in arms about my new campaign commercial which unapologetically calls out the Communist Chinese regime.

In keeping with their history of barbaric attacks on human rights, the Chinese Communist Party’s lies and shameful cover-up of the spread of COVID-19 have recklessly killed people in their own country and now the entire world.
[](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=6001763045&e=01c99b7fbd)
**“Shut your fat, ugly, balding, inbred narrow-jawed neanderthal pigskin face, you genetically inferior piece of caucroach ****.” **

Yep, that was definitely one of the hate e-mails I got last Wednesday. I almost responded to help them spell cockroach correctly!

“You are absolutely disgusting. Truly abhorrent. I think you’re worse than Donald Trump.”
**
But friend, , these vile attacks are a GOOD sign. **

Why you ask?

Because the Democrats backwards worldview informs their foul behavior and their lack of decorum knows no bounds.

The Democrats tried to destroy President Trump with Russian collusion and then a sham impeachment. Now they pick a nominee for president, Sleepy Joe Biden, who wants your tax dollars to pay for healthcare for illegal aliens and to pay for abortions on demand.

**I am proud to stand with you for the exact opposite of that worldview. **

**You and I stand for the constitution, for the unborn, for secure borders, for godly morals, and we stand with President Trump. **

You and I are not surprised that the Democrats are siding with communists and now defending the Chinese Communist Party.

Their attacks are not stopping anytime soon.

**Which is why I need YOU.**

We are at a historic moment in our country’s history as we fight alongside our strong President to defeat this global pandemic.

All our campaign volunteer efforts have become remote and digital. All of your donations to help me get to Congress are being put towards getting our conservative message out across digital airwaves.
**Will you volunteer from home? --- > [Sign up here](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=d0a4e32079&e=01c99b7fbd)**
** **
**Will you make a donation of $10, $20, or $30 today? ---> [Give here](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=cb32074301&e=01c99b7fbd)**
Together you and I will continue being part of the fearless movement to put an end to the evil of communism.

God bless you,

Kathaleen Wall
Republican Candidate for Congressional District 22
---
|
---
|
---
| [Contribute](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=d7d2142b5a&e=01c99b7fbd "Contribute")
---
| | Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
Kathaleen Wall for CongressP.O. Box 1429Sugar Land, TX 77487
[Add us to your address book](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877)
You can [update your preferences](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877&e=01c99b7fbd) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877&e=01c99b7fbd&c=2e95d9971b).

name: Blue Georgia
subject: Voting rights at stake (need your urgent support)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
The right to vote is under attack.
| | |
---
Voting rights are under attack, friend.
Across the country, the GOP is working around the clock to systematically suppress and take away our fundamental right to vote. They're purging voter rolls, drawing partisan district lines - and, during this time of national crisis, obstructing universal vote by mail.
**The ONLY way we'll be able to fight back and make sure that _all_ eligible Americans are able to cast their votes is if we hear from grassroots supporters like you ASAP: ****[Do you agree that voting rights should be protected?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "http://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-voter-suppression?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk85-su-nd")**
In 2018, Republican efforts to suppress the vote likely prevented up to 85,000 Georgians from voting - and with even more at stake in 2020, you can bet they'll try to do it again. It's all part of the GOP's election playbook: Just days ago, Trump said that if reforms like vote-by-mail were in place, "you'd never have a Republican elected in this country again!"
That's why we need to elect Reverend Warnock, a voting rights champion who's committed to representing _all_ Georgians in the Senate, not just a lucky few. But he can't win without you.
**Friend: This is the most consequential election of our lifetimes. If you're with us in our fight to flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and protect voting rights for all, we need you and 52 others in Alpharetta to answer this one question by midnight tonight:**
| | **Should voting rights be protected?**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Together we stopped universal mail-in ballots in NM!
body:
Last night the New Mexico Supreme Court voted to block the Emergency Petition | | |
# [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=0bebd9fbd4&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | Dear Friend
Great news!! Last night the New Mexico Supreme Court unanimously rejected a petition to mandate statewide mail-in voting! The Supreme Court voted to prohibit the Secretary of State and county clerks from sending every registered voter a mail-in ballot for the scheduled June 2 primary. In keeping with existing state code, the Court directed all county clerks to mail absentee ballot applications to all registered voters. Voters will have to complete those ballot applications and send them into their county clerk’s office in order to receive an absentee ballot in the mail.

We won! It was an honor and a privilege to represent voters of New Mexico in a case that was started in NM, but was the tip of the spear in a national effort to force universal mail-in voting.

When the citizens of New Mexico reached out to True The Vote, there was no opposition in place to stop the Emergency Petition. Within days, we assembled a legal team and put together a 59-page brief that was used as the core document in court arguments. The outcome was the court decided it didn’t have a role in controlling elections and it should stay within the bounds of the state constitution.

This ruling is a victory for all Americans. Government cannot be allowed to run roughshod over the Constitutional rights of American citizens.

[**A full copy of the TTV brief can be found here. **](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=cb8df95bdd&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| [ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=2187380baa&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| **THANK YOU to everyone who stepped boldly into the fight! ** Thanks to the amazing patriots in New Mexico who reached out us! Thanks also to our General Counsel Jim Bopp, local counsel Melanie Rhodes, and the team they assembled in lightning speed to put together a 59-page brief that became central in the arguments and made clear we would take up the issue in Federal Court if necessary. NM GOP Attorney Carter Harrison and team also did a great job with their brief and presentation! **[Lastly, thanks to everyone who follows True the Vote and supports our work. Please keep it up! We are a small organization and dependent on individual contributions to remain standing!](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=f5fefedcd5&e=ad8cba7e98)

We’re all in this together...and my friends, with your help, we’re just getting started. ** Onward!

Catherine Engelbrecht
True the Vote

---
